titles.CN: 「虚拟与真实的双向镜」-关卡篇
titles.EN: Looking Glass of Fact and Fiction
titles.JP: 「幻想と真実の二重奏」-ステージ編

异世界穿越.say: 周围是再熟悉不过的墙壁和天花板
与上一刻不同的是，原本热闹的房间中只剩下咱一个人了
虽然当务之急是寻找消失的伙伴，搞清楚现在的处境
可是身体却在不听使唤的颤抖，野性的直觉告诉咱，这里有危险
必须保持冷静
冷静下来…
不可能啊啊啊啊啊！在这种状况怎么可能保持冷静啊！！！
澪！房间里的是大神澪么！！
吹雪？！太好了，你平安无事啊！
此地不宜久留，塞壬的量产型舰队已经向这边靠近了！
塞…塞壬？
唔，从炮声推断应该是驱逐舰级别的主炮。恐怕这些只是侦查舰队，主力舰队还在后面呢
吹雪…倒是意外的冷静…到底是什么状况啊现在！舰队又是怎么回事啊！！
澪酱，冷静一些。外面突然淹没各处的海水，水面上游弋的塞壬舰队…
我们恐怕因为某些原因，随着holo服务器一同穿越到碧蓝航线的世界了，而且来到了冲突的正中心。
塞壬舰队…就是侵占了碧蓝航线世界的海洋，作为游戏中最大反派的那个塞壬么？！
我们发生了异世界穿越？！这不是大事不妙了么！！
可恶…要是这时候我的白上舰队在这里，这些塞壬根本不堪一击——
江风酱，瑞鹤酱， 明明我也是指挥官来着…

sequence: 与命运的抗争，大抵都会迎来如此结局
留存下来的只有微不足道的谜题
存在于彼方的你，能解出来么？

故事的开端.say: 正午时分，商路护航舰队
今天任务也平安无事顺利完成了~
微风拂面，艳阳高照，天气也是个难得的好天气,好想就这么睡过去啊~
怎么了，从刚才开始就一言不发的。
....无趣，如果一直做护卫任务的话，剑会生锈的。
只是偶尔跑一次后勤任务不是蛮好嘛，抓住机会好好放松一下才是~
一直这么严肃可是会和舰队的大家产生距离感的哦，来，笑一个，笑一个~
哎呀，别这么……咦，怎么回事。
空气湿度和海水温度都发生了明显变化。虽然因为大雾看不清楚，不过隐约能看到陆地一样的东西。
毫无疑问是镜面海域啊…专挑人心情好的时候来！真是…塞壬只会迟到，永远不会缺席！
发现多处塞壬舰队反应，向我们这里靠过来了。
唉，短暂的快乐时光…护卫就拜托了。舰载机还勉强放得出来，让塞壬感受一下精锐航空母舰的力量吧！

迷雾.say: 零星的几场战斗结束后，塞壬停止了继续增援，海域恢复了宁静。
就在瑞鹤与江风寻找脱离镜面海域的航线时，海雾消散了
就像出现之时那么突然，二人的视野刹那间豁然开朗
与浓雾出现前的空旷海域不同，无数大小岛屿如凭空出现一般棋布在海域中，远方还有隐约可见的巨大水面建筑物
放眼细看，不论是岛屿还是岛屿上的树木砂石，甚至人工建筑，都是由无数方形色块构成的。
就好像对自然造物的低劣仿制一样
塞壬还真是在镜面海域里折腾一些不得了的东西啊…
现在的情况是，周围环境发生了彻底改变，与港区的联络也因干扰陷入瘫痪。寻找离开镜面海域的航线已经不可能了。
简单来说就是，迷航了嘛~
正解。瑞鹤…你一点都不担心？
东煌有句古话“车到山前必有路”，反正担心也改变不了现状，还不如鼓起精神来。
来都来了，我倒要看看塞壬究竟在这里搞些什么阴谋！

呼救声.say: 难道还有其他人迷航在这里么？！江风！
明白。空中支援拜托了，先行一步！

吹雪与江风.say: 哈啊…哈啊…不行了，咱实在跑不动了…一步都跑不动了！
澪…澪酱……如果在这里停下来的话----
塞壬的炮弹就会像这样打过来的哦…
吹雪快想想办法，咱不想死在这种莫名其妙的状况里啊！
考虑到敌我双方绝望的实力对比…嗯，万策尽了
在二人停驻之际，一架塞壬战机呼啸着投下了一枚炸弹
澪，最后的时光能和你在一起---
现在放弃还太早了！你们快去避难，这里交给我
重樱所属，驱逐舰江风，参上！

异世界的来客.say: 你们没事吧？
欸…欸？！！江风！！这不是江风么！！
澪快看，是江风哎，真真正正的江风哎！！！！
…啊？这是什么展开……总之是得救了么？！
啊啊啊！江风！这凌冽的眼神，修长的身体，柔顺的尾巴！（深呼吸）
喂喂吹雪，给别人带来困扰了啊。
看起来两个人都平安无事的样子，真是太好了。
瑞鹤也来了？！！！
咳嗯，刚才失态了，感谢两位在危急关头出手相救！
猫耳，而且认识我们，你们是新加入重樱的舰船吗？不对……你们没有舰装啊。
猫耳？！看这条柔顺的大尾巴，怎么看都是狐狸吧！
哎？！原来是狐狸么…对不起
算啦…初次见面，我是hololive旗下的虚拟白发兽耳女高中生白上吹雪。虽然经常被认错，不过我不是猫，是狐狸哦！
至于我为什么会认识你们，这个说起来就有些复杂了呢。
我也是hololive旗下，hologamers的大神澪，叫我澪就好，请多指教。
hololive..?可以理解成两位所属的组织名吧
我是翔鹤级航空母舰·瑞鹤，这位是白露型驱逐舰·江风。
嗯嗯，我知道我知道，我还把你们都誓约了哦。
……你在说什么奇怪的话。
看两位都没有携带武装，不像是军事人员…你们的船在什么地方，是迷航了么？
这里是塞壬控制的镜面海域，周围的环境如你们所见，变为了极其扭曲的形象。在脱离危险前，请暂时随我们一起行动吧。
呃…严格也不算迷航，来到这里的原因我们也很困惑，不过这里的事我们多少知道一点哦！
从外观上来看，这里是hololive服务器，或者说一个和hololive服务器十分相似的地方
hololive服务器是…？
类似我们的基地一样的东西…平时我们会和hololive的伙伴们在服务器里一起修建建筑，一起玩耍…
你们的？但是从这里的情况来看，毫无疑问是镜像海域……
今天原本也和往常一样造着建筑，结果突然传来眼前一阵白光，然后就出现了大量塞壬舰队开始发动攻击，和同伴也失散了…
…感觉以前也有过这样的事。
虽然不是很明白，不过应该和雷经常说的「异世界转生」？之类差不多的…情况吧？
轻而易举的接受了？！
唉…之前或多或少也遇到过类似的情况，隐隐约约猜到了
你们会认识我和江风，也是因为什么…异世界的知识吧
哈哈哈…在原本的世界里我的碧蓝航线知识可是十分丰富的哦！
似曾相识的发言…
既然这次又把你们这样的“穿越者”弄过来，塞壬恐怕又在搞些什么阴谋了
嗯……这倒没错。
吹雪，在这里说话也不是办法，我们先去安全的地方吧。
哎？你们知道这样的地方么？
唔…虽然白狐咖啡也不错，不过说到基地和补给的话，果然是那个地方吧…

向导小姐.say: 没错~如果是那里的话，充足的补给和大量的…战略物资，说不定连舰船的补给都可以解决哦~！
等等…！这片海域，你们叫hololive服务器来着，是你们原本的基地吧？
对哦，包括本社大楼在内，我们绝大多数的设施都集中在这片holo服务器中。
在这样重要的基地里，为什么会存在反抗军基地啊？！而且你们似乎一点都不吃惊…
难道各位所属的hololive是一个暴虐无道的高压组织…组织内的成员为了生存只能暗中成立反抗军，在夹缝之中进行反抗么！？
不论到了哪里，都是这些丑陋的战争啊…
欸，啊，唔，在夹缝之中生存的反抗军倒是很贴切…嗯，解释起来感觉很麻烦，就当是这么回事吧。
那个，其实那个是朋友打着「要炸飞邪恶的运营哦」而成立的，大家一起玩闹的组织，并不是用来认真战斗的啦！
原来如此。你们住在hololive世界的holo服务器中，就是为了反抗邪恶的运营吧？大概明白了
感觉完全被误解了，算了，之后再说吧……
我刚才仔细观察了一下，整个服务器现在被海水分割成无数小岛，面积变大了好多好多倍，地质环境也完全改变了，
万幸的是，大多数标志性建筑都完好的保存在小岛上，如果依靠地标定位，找到反抗军基地应该不是十分困难
那就拜托了哦，向导小姐~等到了基地之后，充分休息一下再制定作战计划吧
（向导小姐么…明明我也是指挥官的说）

战斗痕迹.say: 完成委托返航的路上忽然就起雾了，我也不是很清楚…
委托……也就是说，还有其他我们的人也来了吗？
嗯，绫波，拉菲，23，今天是我们4个一起出委托哦~
那么，得把她们也都找到才行了……
吹雪！澪！你们都没事真是太好了！！
嗯，你没事也真是太好了呢（棒读）。
啊，这是我新认识的好朋友，标枪！
没错，我就是hololive里最清纯的普通JK——夏色祭哦。
啊，你就是江风对吧，我知道的，那个，我可以摸摸你的尾巴吗？拥抱一下可以吗？可以和我约会吗？
……我想知道，如果你和白上吹雪都是一般人的话，你的舰装是怎么回事？
舰装是净化亲给我的哦。
嗯，净化亲哦。在危机关头救了祭和阿库娅，又为我们制造了舰装的就是净化亲。
没错，是一个超可爱的美少女哦！
现在净化亲和阿库娅留在反抗军基地巩固防御，祭和标枪负责出来在外面寻找失散的伙伴。
瑞鹤你猜得没错，不过，情况稍微有些复杂…你们一起来基地看一看就知道了。

夏色祭呼吸中.say: 喂，标枪，这场战斗结束后，我们去约会吧！
祭，这种说法已经过时了哦~
居然被飒爽地拒绝了……但是，正是这样的你才更加迷人啊~
呜哇，这个人虽然是同伴但是有点吓人！
和正在呼吸的某个女高中生呢。
嗯，不过目击了出轨现场的情况之后，很想说不认识并且毫不留情地把她丢在这里……
啊哈哈，吹雪的想法也不是不能理解，不过，还是拜托你们去支援她们了！
就算你们不说，标枪也是要救的~上了哦！

反抗军基地.say: 看这个在阳光下闪闪发光的黑曜石建筑，这里就是反抗军基地了。
居然还加装了固定炮台…已经完全要塞化了呢
还不是全部哦，更厉害的是，地表的建筑只是伪装，真正的基地本体隐藏在水面之下，要通过特殊通道才能抵达！
利用伪装结构吸引火力，真正重要的部分全部隐藏起来，名副其实的战时秘密基地
没想到祭和阿库娅酱的反抗军基地，居然有派上正经用处的一天，世界还真是奇妙啊…
哼哼，那么大家做好准备，首先来跟我一起跳入这个水坑吧~

净化亲？！.say: 我回来了~队长，净化亲你们还好么。
祭！！一直没回来担心死我了。吹雪和澪，你们也平安无事真是太好了！
啊，祭回来了啊~正好阿库娅的舰装也调试完毕，旁边的是你失散的同伴么？
嗯！这位是白上吹雪，吹雪，这位是大神澪，澪。
旁边的两位是在战斗中帮助了我们的，瑞鹤小姐和江风小姐,都是新加入反抗军的宝贵力量！
欢迎欢迎~战斗力又加强了呢，那边的是……
……净化者，这是在搞的哪一出？
这个距离，用刀就可以了！
啊哇哇哇，江风，瑞鹤，你们等一下！
……标枪，到底怎么回事？
净化者失忆了？！
没错！看到净化者竟然帮我解决了面前量产型的时候，真把我吓了一跳…
之后我们救下了祭和阿库娅，就跟着她们来到了这个基地。
这真的不是演技么……？
就算是真的，失忆也不能让她过去的所作所为一笔勾销，为了我们的世界，我必须在这里解决你。
等一下！净化亲这么可爱，不是会做出那种事的人，那些事肯定是，相似的什么别的人做的啦！
江风稍等下！虽然我能理解你的想法，但是，我们现在对这里完全不了解，而且……
那个，我真的对你们做了很过分的事情吗？要是那样的话…我还是现在就出去和测试怪人拼了算了！
测试怪人…？总觉得，战意都提不起来了。
现在比起战斗，不如先一起调查怎么从这里离开吧，好吗？
……我会盯着她。
嗯！之后指挥官如果责怪下来，我会承担的！
……那倒不必。非常时期，特殊处理。不过大家切不可掉以轻心
太好了，刚才江风的样子把咱吓的都不敢动了……那现在大家是统一战线的伙伴了吧？
充其量只是临时休战而已。净化者，吹雪和澪的舰装就交给你了，请努力工作哦
切…我知道啦！已经差不多熟悉感觉了，很快就能造出几套很厉害的舰装让你们刮目相看的！
你们还有多少同伴在这里？
绫目，诗音，时乃空前辈，还有三个人，不知道她们现在怎么样了。
绫目有鬼神之力，诗音是魔法使，她们两个肯定没问题。空前辈的话…因为是空前辈所以肯定也没问题啦！祭的直觉是这么说的！
三个人…我们这边也有三个人……
分头行动吧，瑞鹤和阿库娅和标枪，我和夏色祭，两组同时搜索，吹雪和澪就留在这里等待舰装制作完成。
咱刚刚检查了一下，基地的库存还不是充足状态，考虑到持久战的可能性，沿路也注意一下收集补给品吧。
呼呼呼，收集反抗军用的物资可是我最擅长的，交给本阿库娅大人吧~
那么，既然计划定下来了，大家先休息一下，我去给大家准备一些路上用的便当~
标枪，以后一定会成为好妻子的……
（回去之后向大家推荐碧蓝航线吧，嗯！）

一般女性夏色祭.say: 舰装真是神奇的装备呢。发射起来有这么大的威力，操作起来却可以轻松上手。
有了舰装，就算是祭这样前一秒还是手无缚鸡之力的清纯JK，也能瞬间拥有强大的战斗力哎。
…理论上只有像我们这样的“舰船”才能使用舰装
你们能适应舰装，是特例中的特例，或许是因为你们异世界来客的身份，也许还和塞壬的奇怪实验有关。
原因先不论，结果上来说，祭也有了守护同伴的力量了！
之前从吹雪那里听说过这里的一些事…如果人人都能像祭这样使用舰装与塞壬进行战斗的话……
就算对手是塞壬，也会在一瞬间被打败吧~
…听起来很美好，不过现实可是很残酷的
而且所有人都要走上战场…这样的世界不论是否能消灭塞壬，都将会走向自我毁灭吧
江风外表虽然很可爱，个性却好酷啊，这就是所谓的反差萌？
祭对这个世界还不是很了解，也不太了解战斗，随便说了奇怪的话真的很抱歉！
…没关系。说起来，hololive是你的所属组织吧，成为hololive反抗军的感觉如何？
哼哼哼，其实祭本来就是反抗军成员哦，只是没想到真的能等到成功反抗的一天，老实说激动的不行呢！
你们这个世界的人真怪…
江风酱也要对自己再直率一些才是~

TNT?!.say: 那边的箱形白色建筑就是holomart了，平时我们在仓库中囤积了各类道具，是收集补给品的最理想地点！
关于刚才提到的这些补给品，我有一点不理解的事。
刚才因为各种各样的事，没来得及自我介绍！
现在重新介绍一下！大家好，初次见面，我是hololive所属虚拟女仆，湊阿库娅！
虽然是女仆却并不擅长家务，不过如果是玩游戏的话，我可是超级擅长哦！！！！！！！！！
以下是来自阿库娅的特别补给品收集小贴士！
在这个异常化的holo服务器中，除了原本就存在的食物、水、药品等道具，不知为什么，舰船能使用的各类补给品也散落在整个服务器中！
但是，有一样更重要的东西，那就是，TNT！这里的TNT和原本世界服务器里的那些TNT相比，在爆炸威力上完全不是一个等级！！！
哼哼哼，还好我以前事先在服务器的各处角落都埋藏了大量TNT，没想到这次居然能派上用场……
啊，对了，好像现在异常化的服务器里不知为何，也会自然生成少量TNT！
TNT可是整个holo服务器中最强力的道具，大家一定要大量收集哦！！！！！！！！！！！！！！！
食品药品倒不必说，矿物也许是塞壬制造舰装会用到的材料，可是TNT是…？
为什么服务器里会有大量TNT也是很奇怪，根据吹雪小姐的，你们是一个，唔…偶像会社…？
偶像会社呢…
TNT的事解释起来稍微有些复杂。总之在这里，TNT是最常用的破坏道具，你看到的这些建筑基本都有它的功劳哦。
居然用大量TNT来造房子么？和平年代还真是奢侈啊…既然是大威力的杀伤武器，我不反对多收集一些。
嗯……虽然感觉理解有些偏差，不过就当是这样吧！
现在整片区域都被塞壬前锋部队控制了，要收集物资，首先要清理出一条道路才行。
没问题~夏色祭，全速出航~！

救援通讯.say: 祭，收集物资暂停。瑞鹤发来消息，侦察机发现塞壬航空队正在对一座巨大的木质城堡发动攻击。
城堡好像比看起来要结实不少，不过应该也撑不了太久了。
瑞鹤认为城堡中的可能是你们的伙伴，因为我们这边离得比较近，她让我们快去看一下
巨大的木质城堡…难道是…绫目的百鬼城？！明白了，祭这就动身！

百鬼城.say: 顺着海面向前望去，越过无数小岛礁，一座壮丽的和风城堡孤独的矗立在海面之上。
仿佛守护着某条重要航道，又像是在宣示着整片海域的所有权一般。
但是，它的威风或许也已经到此为止了。
因为，在不远处的海域，塞壬舰队已悄然集结，向着这边不断聚拢。
虽然一路逃到了百鬼城，但是也到此为止了吗……
余等明明只是在服务器里造房子，到底为什么会遇到这种事啊！
一定是塞壬搞的鬼……
塞壬……难道是吹雪平时玩的那个游戏？
这里难道是游戏里的世界？！
就算想从暗道逃走…绫目酱！为什么这么大的城堡，连一条避难用的暗道都没有啊！！！
因为！百鬼城是一座以日常舒适生活为理念而建筑的城！饲养动物，种植庄稼，悠闲度过每一天，是以这样的理念设计的…
从最开始就没有考虑过要上战场，更不可能修建什么能穿越到水下的逃生通道啦！
可恶…无能为力了么
放心，我们去解决那些塞壬。
哎？！！！绫波，拉菲，只有你们两个真的没关系吗！
就、就是说啊，不、不然余也和你们一起去吧，余的刀还是很锋利的！
不行，你们没有舰装，会很危险。
而且，诗音和绫目，都是普通人，不用参加战斗。战斗交给我们就好。
但、但是…
没关系，小场面。
对面不知道为什么，全都是航空母舰的编队，对我们有利。
靠近的话，就是我们的主场！

救援.say: 那两个可爱的女孩子是你的同伴吗？
好厉害，面对比自己大那么多的航母还能这么英勇的战斗！
真奇怪，这片海域的塞壬以纯航空母舰编队为主，缺乏随行的护卫舰…
走吧，我们去帮她们解决这场战斗。

团聚.say: 哇啊啊啊！祭，你没事吗，太好了…..
不哭，不哭，没事啦～诗音了不起哦~
余等能得救，还是多亏了拉菲和绫波的帮助呢，谢谢你们。
没事，塞壬也是我们的敌人。
这样一来，我们之中走散的人就只剩下空前辈了
嗯，我们这边也只剩下Z23了，但愿能像绫波拉菲她们一样顺利汇合。
虽然现在安全了，不过余的百鬼城……
不用难过绫目酱！等战斗结束之后，我们陪你一起重建，建一个更大，更帅气，更坚固的百鬼城~！
这次一定要加上地下暗道…！

三角.say: 很遗憾，碧蓝航线的Z23，你将葬身于此。
等一下，阿库娅，不用做到这一步吧？
而且，你背后的这些塞壬，我记得吹雪说过，是这个世界的敌人……
空前辈，请不要慌张，等解决了这个碧蓝航线的敌人，我会向你解释。
……糟了，这样下去要被围攻了，我要找个突破口。
哎，要是这个时候她们三个在就好了…

两个阿库娅？.say: 江风那边似乎一切顺利，把你的两名同伴救出来了，是叫绫目和诗音么？
太好了！不过，还有空前辈没有找到啊……
这位空前辈是你们的什么人啊？好像你们之间都是直呼名的，只有对这个人叫前辈？
空前辈是最早加入hololive的成员，我们所有人的前辈啦，她平时就像大家的姐姐一样，对我们每个人都很好，很照顾我们。
就像翔鹤姐一样吧！………啊，不对，翔鹤姐偶尔比较毒舌呢。
嗯？侦察机显示那边有交战反应，交战双方是……
至少看起来和你一模一样，而且，她身边有一个棕色长发的女性。
那一定是空前辈！和我？怎么可能！！！！！

山田·赫敏.say: 这边……我记得是吹雪的白上神社吧？……啊，有了有了，在那边！
空前辈！
咦，阿库娅？这边的也是阿库娅，那边的也是阿库娅……这是怎么回事？
当心，那边的女仆是塞壬的人！
那边那个是假的，空前辈，我才是真货啦！！！！
欸欸欸？
塞壬这么快就制造出了你的镜像了么……
镜像？
解释起来很麻烦，而且我也根本不懂…不过镜面海域名称的来源，就是因为进入海域的人会遇到自己相似的复制品，就像镜子一样。
不过，不论外表如何相似，终究是塞壬制造出的假货，一般见到直接消灭掉就好了。
有点奇怪，那边那个女仆，好像和通常的“棋子”不太一样
哎？
呼呼呼~我的名字叫山田·赫敏，受主人时间与空间的支配者的命令，在此迎接各位的到来。
时间与空间的支配者…是在说谁？
这片海域怎么净是些乱七八糟的塞壬啊……！
呵呵，是在说谁呢~诸位已经没有知道这个的必要了
我，山田·赫敏，将会遵照主人的命令，在此将你们尽数消灭！
欸，阿库娅，不可以这样！
请不要阻止我，空前辈，消灭这些人是我的职责。
阿库娅才不会说这种话！
……她，不，我不会吗？
不，我会的！因为，我也是湊阿库娅。
战意高涨啊对面……喂，阿库娅，如果你下不去手，就站在旁边看着吧，这不怪你。
山田·赫敏…可恶的塞壬，不要小看了经过地狱游戏生存下来的战斗女仆啊！
大家不必顾虑，敌人就是敌人，尽情地开火吧！

首战告捷.say: 在击败山田·赫敏后，一道光将她笼罩，似乎是撤退了。
无论如何，所有人终于团聚，稍微安心的众人决定回到基地，好好休整一番，并且思考下一步计划。
当晚，反抗军基地
敌人在被打倒的瞬间在光芒中消失了，这难道是…
毫无疑问是hololive服务器的传送指令呢！
真麻烦啊，那个测试怪人已经开始控制镜面海域的机能了么…
战斗拖得越久，我们，就越危险
虽然让她跑了，不过遭受了那种损伤，应该很长一段时间内都无法战斗了吧。
看来测试者就是所谓的「时间与空间的支配者」的概率非常的高…
本次面对强敌的战斗，hololive各位的表现都很出色哎~
尤其是绫目酱和诗音呢。虽然最开始一副不情愿的样子，结果打起来比谁都起劲呢
这这这不是对待敌人么…对敌人当然不能手下留情了！
对…对哦，阿库娅本人都打的那么起劲，诗音自然也要火力全开了！
令人感动的万组友谊呢
这种战斗，就是你们在这个世界的日常么…？
没错。量产型，领洋者，追迹者，净化者，测试者……
就这样与塞壬、与敌人不分昼夜地战斗。一场战斗的结束就是下一场战斗的开始
我早就已经习惯了
抱歉，说了严肃的话题
我们在镜面海域内制作了舰装，这些数据会被塞壬抽取出来制作成“棋子”，也是理所当然的事……
今后的战斗可能会更加艰苦。战场不是什么温和的地方，请提前做好心理准备
啊哈哈…江风的意思是，不过无论如何，我们赢得了今天的战斗
今后只要一直胜利下去，一路击败测试怪人，夺取服务器的控制权就能获得这次战役的胜利啦！
好啦好啦，大家都别板着脸了，首战告捷，全员团聚，应该好好庆贺一番才是！

夜晚发生的事.say: 我知道你在担心什么…我们都亲手击败过无数同伴的棋子…
她们已经被卷进来了，这是事实。这里是她们的基地，她们有为自己战斗的理由和权利
我知道，虽然嘴上没说什么，眼神里可以看出明显的动摇呢。所以你故意那样说，是想顺势让她们远离战场吧
但现在大家是同伴，你应该对同伴多抱有一些信任。
如果担心她们的情况，就亲口向她们好好说出来吧
呼…果然出来吹吹海风感觉舒服多了~
那个阿库娅酱…不是真正的阿库娅酱吗…
是敌人的话…就只能战斗了吧
…真的只能战斗么？下次…我能坦然开火么…？
如果再一次遇到她们，我应该怎么办才好......
果然空前辈，在哪里都是温柔的空前辈啊。

分头行动.say: 次日
那么，全员到齐了，接下来开始作战会议。
是，Z23老师！
是，Z23老师！
怎么感觉多了一个起哄的家伙……算了，那么，首先是请净化…咳，净化亲发言。
来啦，虽然我也不是很确定，不过海域的核心控制装置通常位于整片海域概念上最重要的位置，而不是物理意义上的海域中心。
一上来就是这种发言…你这家伙，真的失忆了吗……！
真的失忆啦！！不过，只有对镜像海域的知识比较完整地保留了下来，我也不太清楚怎么回事
也就是，只要前往概念上作为holo服务器中心的地方，就能找到将镜面海域复原的方法？
holo服务器概念上的中心……难道是指hololive本社大楼么？！毕竟我们所有人都属于hololive呀
确实是一种可能性。不过目前侦察机已经搜索了大片区域。目前还没有发现类似的建筑…
不过前方的海域倒是找到了一座明明昨天还没有出现的大迷宫，也许隐藏了什么东西也说不定。
巨大的迷宫……难道是咱的波乱万丈迷宫？
我也认为在那里隐藏了某些东西。因此，我有一个方案，根据现有的兵力和舰种，我们兵分三路。
白上吹雪、大神澪、百鬼绫目、时乃空为A组，夏色祭、湊阿库娅、绫波、紫咲诗音和标枪为B组，我、瑞鹤、拉菲和江风为C组。
由A组负责保障大本营反抗军基地的安全，B组负责维持前线与基地的联络通畅，同时作为后备增援舰队
C组为先头部队，前往迷宫海域内进行探索...
虽然很感谢Z23你的好意，但是，请让我也去前线吧。
哎？被发现了么...
咱、咱也要和吹雪一起去！咱是迷宫的建造者，对里面每一处机关都了如指掌，带路包在我身上吧！
……好吧，既然你们都这么说了，那就A组也一起去吧。
B组必须留下，要有人保护基地，还有许多塞壬残留在这片海域里。
呜呜，我还想赌上反抗军队长的尊严，最先找到本社大楼的位置呢…
这种情况下就先放一放那些东西吧，阿库娅。
绫波，标枪基地就拜托你们了
明白
（期待的目光）
至于净化亲你……你还是在家留守吧，我暂时也不知道该怎么安排你比较好。
欸欸欸？！
那么，所有人出发，目标，突破这片镜面海域！
噢！

波乱万丈迷宫.say: 不但拓展了规模，新设置了大量机关和伏兵，甚至还制造了模仿原迷宫安全路线的陷阱路线…还是在海上…
已经是堪比孔明陷阱的海上大迷宫了啊。
改造这片迷宫的人肯定对原本的迷宫非常熟悉呢…
这次是澪么…从合理性角度来说，确实是最适合守卫迷宫的人选。
会特意派人设置阻挡，反而说明我们走的是正确方向吧
正因如此，敌人依然停留在迷宫中，伺机袭击我们的可能性很高
可恶，咱也要认真起来了！真品怎么可能输给赝品啊！

套娃.say: 哼哼~大家在下一个路口右转哦。
在这里停下，左边那个印有盘子标记的路才是正确的路！
嘿嘿，多亏了Z23的建议呢，“如果是在自己修改迷宫的话，要会在哪些地方做手脚来误导自己”！
顺着这个思路想的话，正确的道路自然而然就推导出来了呢。
就按照这个气势，一鼓作气的突破迷宫吧！

角色卡.say: 迷途之人，果然和占卜的结果一样，不论怎么阻挠都终将抵达这里么…
既然如此，欢迎来到我的占卜馆，我是占卜师澪川依代，也以知性之澪为人所知。
塞壬居然复制了…大家在玩TRPG时候的角色卡？！
刚才看到盘子印记的那一刻，余就有种隐约会是这样展开的预感了…
投降吧，另一个我，面对这么多人，你没有胜算的。
其实我也是想这么做的……
可是时间与空间的支配者的命令，没办那么做啊…
而且还说了些什么“不要手下留情，尽全力去战斗”…所以我必须要打倒你们，对不起
多说无益-----！
只一瞬间，在敌人摆出攻击架势之前，江风已经突进到敌人面前先手挥下了手中的直刀
刀锋在空中划出一道优美又凛冽的轨迹
（得手了…！）
就在江风这么认为时，“撒拉”传来了一声清脆的破碎声
没用的哦…
通过摔碎盘子抵消了江风酱的攻击？！
毕竟依代酱是盘之占卜师呢…
啧，这样的话-----
意识到攻击失手的江风，快速拉开距离，向敌人发出一束鱼雷，然而…
这次是直接用盘子击碎了水中的鱼雷？！
依代酱貌似拥有75点投掷呢………
澪酱…为什么当初要加这么多奇怪的设定啊…
本来就是只登场一次的角色，没有考虑过会出现这种状况啊！
江风小心！
就在江风专注瞄准眼前的敌人时，不知何时潜伏在暗处的另一个敌人发动了偷袭。
休想得逞！
空前辈！！！
千钧一发之际，时乃空推开江风，用舰装挡住袭来的炮弹
没…没事！净化亲做的盾牌还是蛮坚固的…帮大忙了！
不胜感激…
守护大家的安全是我的职责，我不会让你伤害她们的！
切，被挡住了么
总算及时赶到了啊，奈切酱
呵呵，对面的敌人，初次见面，余名叫燕子花奈切，如你们所见，只是一名柔弱的女子高中生罢了
大家不要被骗了！燕子花奈切虽然看起来弱不经风，可是实际上是拥有足足70点拳击能力的筋肉大小姐啊！
你在说什么，余可是完全不知道哦~
依代酱别发呆了，一起上咯！

迷宫的征服者.say: 不…不行了！
到此为止了么…
又是和之前一样的传送指令把她们传送走了！
在最后极限时刻才触发...是某种服务器的保护特性么
呼…虽说知道是塞壬制造出的战斗兵器，不过就这么真的将其破坏心理压力还是挺大的
要是都像这么在最后一丝血被传送走，也算能放下心里负担全力战斗了~果然真品是不可能输给赝品的！
唉…还好这里不是剧场版，也不是EX关……
无法彻底击败敌人，就意味着现在击败的敌人迟早会卷土重来，战况一旦拖延久就危险了哎
最初就没有考虑过持久战。
空小姐，今天的眼神中的迷茫减少了不少，行动也果断多了呢
我已经不会再犹豫了，只有阻止塞壬的计划，才能真正结束这一切
拉菲也不想总和长得一样的对手战斗了……
是啊，面对这些和同伴长得一样的复制品，又有谁赢了之后会觉得好受呢。
归根结底，都是塞壬的错！嗯…回去之后去揍净化亲消消气好了！
拉菲也要…
这边听得到哦！
哎？！怎么偏偏在这时候发来联络了…
Z23，你们那边做了什么吗？
我们刚刚解决掉了塞壬伏兵正准备继续前进，基地出现什么问题了么？
倒不是基地的事…
是空中！就在刚刚一道黑色的光幕突然凭空出现在海面上封锁了水面！从距离看，正好就是你们迷宫的另一边出口左右。
什么？
大家快抬头看！
如标枪所说，一道巨大的光幕，不知何时出现在了空中。
…该说是空中么？它几乎横跨了整片海洋，看不到顶端，也看不到边缘。
跟你们说啊！这道屏障简直坚固的离谱！！刚刚诗音火力全开，居然！连一个窟窿都没打出来！
明显是那种由GM制造出来，在设定上不可通行的防御壁呢…
没办法继续前进了...
今天只能先回基地商量对策了，撤退吧
那个，如果水面和天空都不行的话…
祭也许，有一个办法…

祭的作战计划.say: 呵呵，这样一来这群反叛军就没办法继续前进了。处理得十分得当，军师。
请放心，她们绝对破坏不了这道利用您的能量发生器制造的屏障。
不过，这些机械还是有些不听使唤啊。
是因为权限验证还没通过么？
太奇怪了吧，明明我才是这片镜面海域的管理者，为什么权限认证始终通不过啊！
请不要着急，一定是之前的实验事故导致了机械故障。随着启动越来越多的机械，最终权限一定会恢复正常的

波乱万丈迷宫作战结束后，面对任何手段都无法破坏，切割了海面的黑色光幕
夏色祭提出的解决方案是----

祭…那个，水下的方案路上已经让阿库娅潜下去试过了…

恐怕屏障已经一直延伸到海床了哦

这是什么意思，祭？
等等，难道说……不会吧……
阿库娅和诗音，脸色变了。
难道说…要利用那个一直挖到岩浆层的混沌大坟墓么？！
地下…大坟墓…？
咳…那是诗音的比喻啦，比喻！正式名称叫hololive之暗，就是一个设置有大量机关的秘密基地啦
（无视）

没错~天空变得更高，大地变得更宽阔，同时出现了大片的海洋
不过，虽然尺寸改变了，如果利用以前就位于海底之下的秘密基地，也许就能用里面的水道绕过屏障了，祭是这么想的
原来如此，就算是测试怪人，也不会浪费能量把防护罩遮到岩浆层吧
听起来是当前状况下最有可行性的方案，有试一试的价值！
看来作战计划决定了呢，目标---hololive之暗！作战开始~

hololive之暗.say: 在众人的地毯式搜索下，入口巨大的钻石十字标志很快就被发现了。
经过讨论，决定由湊阿库娅，紫咲诗音留守基地，其余众人分为突入组和支援组，分别展开作战行动——
唯独才不想被趴在我舰装上的你说这种话！
本来还想着做好舰装之后，继续留在基地稳固防御就好了！为什么我这次也要一起来啊！！
托您的福，现在基地周边已经固若金汤到一只鸟也飞不过去了…你这么急着回去做什么？
攻击诱导的稻草人，密置陷阱的迷宫，再加上几台苦力怕大炮…构建防御设施的工作意外的有趣啊！
祭认为，她到现在还没对秘密基地本身出手已经很克制了…
这次，净化亲的力量，是不可或缺的
拉菲说的没错，不论是净化亲坚固的防御，灵活的机动还是密集的弹幕，怎么看都是本次作战中最佳的人选呢！
还有净化亲威力强大的激光，可是必要之时能一发扭转战局的强大武器啊！
在本次的特殊地形中，净化者的战斗力确实十分有帮助
………呵呵呵，既然都说到这个份上了，就让你们见识一下认真状态的净化亲吧！

灵魂提问.say: 「真的好吗？」「已经来不及了哦」「前方可是地狱」一路上的这些牌子……
这些牌子究竟是什么意思…？
大家一起来的话，果然氛围上完全不一样了呢~
哎？！不对…祭的三块牌子应该是「真的好吗？」「还来得及」「没有下次了哦」啊
难道说……
夏色祭，hololive中，你最喜欢的女孩子是谁？
谁在那边？！
那是……祭的镜像？！
镜像？那作为本体的你，来回答我刚才的问题啊。在hololive中，你最喜欢的女孩子是谁？
看来回答不出来呢~
哼哼哼，想要尽快解决战斗回到大家的身边，而不是在这里回答问题，这就是祭的答案！
什么？！
这一炮漂亮！
居然没有被这个问题干扰，怎么可能……
无论是“我全都喜欢”，还是“我选不出来”…区区语言，怎么有陪在对方的身边有说服力！
祭已经不想思考为什么要在这里给镜像的名字加空格了…
打败造成这次事故的罪魁祸首，然后回到hololive的大家身边！阻拦祭的，都是敌人！
内容姑且不论，好像说了很帅气的话啊…
咳咳…全员注意，准备战斗！

不一般的友情.say: 好弱…
但是好顽强…不论打倒多少次，还是会精神饱满的贴上来！
斯哈…斯哈…斯哈（战术换气）
好不容易诞生在这个充满美少女的世界上，祭可不能倒在这里啊！
祭酱，加油啊！
哦哦哦！！
不一般的友情.actorName: 夏色祭&夏 色 祭

哦哦哦啊啊啊啊啊啊！！！

FUBUKI↓FUBUKI↑FUBUKI↑FUBUKI!!!!!啊啊，啊啊啊啊！
可恶的塞壬…！迫害也要分清地点和场合啊！！！
明明还有祭妹啊，拉拉队员啊，这么多出色的人设可以选！为什么偏偏是这一个啊！！！！

十分抱歉，接下来我会布置更加严密的防御的。
传送回来虽然看似费事，不过当修复完毕后，保留了之前战斗经验的“棋子”就会变得更强哦

祭有制作恐怖游戏的潜质…
实在是太刺激了，咱的胃…（呕）
呜呜呜…祭这个大白痴！！
我好像看到了毕业的先代阿库娅们在天上招手…
这样吓唬同伴们可不好哦

按照惯例，先派出航空队侦查一下地形…哎？为什么叫不出侦察机来…？

塞壬在这里花大力气无视自然法则的目的究竟是…

展望台，可以展望这片海域的全貌吗？

在侦察机无法高空飞行的时候，总归有一探究竟的价值。

抖S空.say: 大家都到齐了啊，欢迎来到展望台

气氛太过自然了，完全没有感受到敌意！

那么你就是敌人咯？哈哈哈哈！早就想说一次这句台词了~！！
果然是这样么…没办法了，大家不要手下留情，准备战斗！
尽管打过来吧，我可不会输哦！

诗音，不要将注意力全都集中在舰载机上，仔细观察一下周围环境

周围的那些炸弹就是对面的空扔的吧！
完全陷入对面空前辈的节奏中了哎…
好强的控场能力…
我的人格根源在你哦，真正的你将来肯定会超越我的。不过…首先要在这里打败我才有未来就是了~

其他人倒是能熟练使用舰装了，应该是碧蓝航线各位教导的功劳吧…
不过…阿库娅！
在在在在在！
刚刚模仿我的neta时候的气势哪儿去了？
对不起对不起对不起对不起，空前辈对不起对不起对不起对不起

不要~
哇啊啊啊啊啊啊啊啊啊啊啊！！！！！！！！！！
仅靠一人就压制了两个舰队，怎么可能！
强敌…！
战斗能力和之前的“棋子”完全不在一个级别上！
唔…这么强的力量，肯定不是这个机体本身提供的，从外部获取能源供给了么
能源供给？！可…可是周边完全没看到类似电缆或者类似连接线的存在哎
舰装正在闪红光，很可疑

时间要到了么…很遗憾，这次是你们胜利了
“大家，不要停下来哦！”这是时间与空间的支配者让我带的话，也是我想对你们说的…
一阵耀眼的白光过后，镜像时乃空消失在众人的视线中
这算是…险胜么
此为敌人主动撤退，并非胜利…
不过总算度过眼前的危机了…
对不起对不起对不起，是我得意忘形了，对不起对不起对不起…
没事了，没事了哦（摸头）
果然是增幅装置…看起来是针对镜面海域内战斗特殊定制的，应该不具有泛用性。
不过没想到测试怪人已经这么快就研发出这种东西了…
如果敌人的“棋子”大面积装备这种装置的话，即便有装置本身的限制在，我们也胜算渺茫

过山车.say: 装置测试成功了呢。
虽然还有时间限制这一不利因素，不过使用者的战斗力可以依靠装置获得巨幅提升。
只要再多调整一下，普遍装配下去的话，我的军团很快就能扫平整个服务器了。
这都是您逐步取得服务器控制权的证明啊。只要您能重新获得最终权限，反抗者什么的就完全不足为虑。
说的不错。我还要继续工作，你就再陪她们玩一阵子吧。
在短暂的辨认之后，湊阿库娅顺利地在展望台的地图上发现了本社大楼的位置。
哈↑哈哈哈，哈↑哈哈哈！终于…终于发现本社大楼的位置了！hololive反抗军！集结出发！！！！！！！！！！！！！！！！！！！！！！！！！
阿库娅小姐完全恢复精神了呢
本社大楼的位置，还有好远…
海面上出现岩浆的部分越来越多了，毫无疑问是继防护壁之后的塞壬新型防御装置啊
难道塞壬想把整个海面都变成岩浆？！
原理上也不是不可能…如果失去了海面，我们无论如何也不可能到达本社大楼了
好比对面是创造模式，我们是生存模式的处境呢
大家快来看，在展望台后面的小岛上发现了大量TNT储备！
二十箱，整整二十箱TNT就堆在那里哎！加上我们迄今为止收集的量，足够把半个holo服务器炸上天了！
咦？以前这里有这么多东西吗……
Z23，怎么了，一副愁眉苦脸的样子。

我从刚才起就有点在意，在天空中云层里，若隐若现的那几条黑线是什么呀？

余和其它伙伴也参与过改造工程，在天气好的时候乘坐的话，可以浏览hololive全景哦~
哎？！这么大规模的过山车，哎嘿嘿，好想和指挥官坐一次看看啊~
标枪，认真一点…如果能从空中移动的话，确实可以绕过海面上的岩浆和敌人…
应该在展望台附近就有轨道入口，诗音去找一下哦！

被破坏的入口.say: 这已经是第三个入口了哎…
塞壬…提前把所有入口都炸毁了
在决定乘坐过山车之后，众人连续找到了三处入口，不过基座都已经被炸毁了
从作战开始之后，就感觉塞壬行动总是快我们一步。看来对面有一个懂兵法的军师坐镇呢
破坏的痕迹。规整的不像是舰炮或者航弹留下来的。
诗音的魔法爆炸之后，就是这种形状哦？
诗音…过山车原来是被你摧毁的么？！
这一区域塞壬派来阻碍我们的人很明显了呢

一般…小诗音.say: 到此为止了，你这个冒牌货！！居然敢破坏本诗音大人辛辛苦苦搭建的过山车！
名…名字又带空格！祭有种非常强烈不好的预感
祭↓祭↓祭↓祭↑啊啊啊啊阿!!!!!啊啊，啊啊啊啊！啊！祭↓祭↓祭↑啊啊啊啊啊！

没想到诗音小姐，也有性格这么热烈的一面啊…
哎？！这是诗音酱原本也存在这种个性么，我还以为测试者的装置终于出问题了
那个只是一时兴起的黑历史，才不是本性啦啊啊啊啊阿！！！
同一个Neta玩两次，设计者的大忌
Neeeeeeee！大家别顾着看热闹，快帮我阻止她啊！！
新意不足么…没关系，诗音还准备了一个大招呢
要开始了哦~有一些事，想要说给你听啊！果然祭酱，是最可爱的啊！喜欢你，喜欢你，最------

MP耗尽.say: 听人说话要听完啊，你这个小学生…
说谁是小学生啊！你这个笨蛋！略~~~~~~
再见了，直率的诗音酱。
你在感动什么！扁你哦！
这就算…打倒了么？意外的没什么挑战性啊
从战斗力上来说，应该算迄今为止遇到的所有“棋子”中最弱的了
比最开始见到的假阿库娅酱还要弱呢…
哈？！那不是敌人的事么！敌人弱你们应该开心吧！
总觉得，除了空前辈之外，余等的镜像根本就是在公开处刑了…
啊哈哈，毕竟都是我们真实在直播中展现过的一面呢。
到现在为止都没出现我的镜像，究竟会遇到什么个性呢，老实说我都稍微有些害怕了……
虽然作为同一战线的我也不好说什么，但这方面说实话，也有点自作自受的成分在里面……
唔……难道我的性格也是净化者真实存在的一部分？
…你只是单纯失忆了而已吧！失忆的人变出什么性格来也根本不奇怪
我也劝你不要这么想…正因为你现在是净化亲，而非净化者，事情才有现在的余地。
如果你是净化者的一部分，那么无论你是什么样，我依然会消灭你。
好好好~不过现在这种情况下，和你们发展出热血的友情，这种展开是完全可能的咯~？
梦话就去梦里说。
总而言之从这个假诗音的战斗力上来看，应该是一直在避免与我们的正面交战
也就是在这里会遇到她只是偶然，有可能还存在尚未被破坏的入口？

没错，现在放弃还太早了~过山车在别处应该还有很多入口，我们再去找找吧！

MIOSHIO-COASTER.say: 那群反抗军还是找到了没被炸毁的入口，这可是严重失职哦，军师
现在之前战斗中损坏的棋子还没修好吧，你打算怎么办？
请您放心，一切都还在计划之中

毕竟曾经学习了很多“孔明的陷阱”嘛~这次我会亲自出马，请您继续专心于权限的取回上

漂浮在空中的过山车…奇妙的感觉。

啊啊啊…意识越来越模糊，开始执行清理程序，我要消失了么…
“啊~大家请听我说，因为塞壬网络的恢复，我现在要返回塞壬终端了哦”
“能陪你们一起战斗到这一刻真是太好了…”
“啊啊，说的太严重了！别露出那种表情，我顶多回终端写几篇检查就没事啦~”
“大家，再见咯~”
什么也看不到，什么也听不到了，要是能骗到她们就好了…
这样的我究竟算真品还是赝品…不行，无法思考了
可恶……至少最后想回沙发上再玩一会游戏啊……

归途.say: 净化亲，消失了……
这次是真正的，彻底结束了么…
虽然是异常化的塞壬，终究还是一个了解敌人的好机会。早知道之前多陪她打打游戏就好了…
净化亲不在，反而稍微有点不习惯了…要是塞壬都像她一样的话，就不需要战斗了呢
她说要回去之后写检查，没问题吧…?
等离开这片海域之后，我们之后也要开始寻找回家的方法了呢
关于这一点，我想过了。指挥官和明石都有处理过类似事件的经验，一定能帮到你们的！
滴滴滴…滴滴滴…
通讯器恢复了？！
喂？瑞鹤？是瑞鹤么？！
是翔鹤姐的声音！
太好了，终于联系到你们了！舰队发生什么事了？
翔鹤姐！…几周没见想死我了！！！
几周？你在说什么事？
我们和瑞鹤江风的舰队均在最后一次任务的返航途中迷航，被困在了塞壬的镜面海域内。
经过几周的战斗，刚刚破坏海域中的核心装置，解除了海域封锁，这才能收到你们的联络。
从你们两支舰队联络开始算起，到现在只有不到24小时哦？
居然还不到一天？！
这种现象难道说…那片镜面海域中的时间流逝速度和其他地方不一样么？！
这种现象从原理上来说也不是完全不可能的喵~
明石！在这种情况下看到你真是太令人安心了…
说起来，旁边的几位是…？
啊！她们是被卷入塞壬实验来到这里的异世界访客，这数周内一直同我们并肩战斗的战友，是同伴哦！
异世界的访客，原来如此喵…明石已经大致猜到状况了喵…
不用担心喵！只要在那片镜面海域把塞壬留下来的装置折腾折腾，总会有办法的喵！
看来回来之后要有很多话要说呢，不过…
这段时间以来，你们都辛苦了。
欢迎回家～然后，欢迎来到我们的世界~

An Interdimensional Encounter.say: All around me are those familiar walls, that familiar ceiling
Not long ago it was bustling in here, but now I am the only one here
My mind knows I must search for my missing friends and get a hold of the situation
But my body trembles with fear, my instincts warning me that this place is dangerous
I need to compose myself...
Calm down! Calm! Yourself! Down!
BOOOOOM!
I can't! I can't do it! How's anyone supposed to calm down with this going on around them?!
Mio? Is that you there?!
Fubuki?! Thank the algorithm you're okay!
We need to get out of here. Mass-produced Siren ships are coming our way!
Si... rens?
Hold on... They sound like destroyers, based on those explosions. It's probably just a vanguard fleet. The main fleet must be behind them.
You're... keeping your cool surprisingly well... Wait, what did you say? A fleet? Whaddya mean "fleet"?
Calm down, Mio. There are Siren fleets around us as far as the eye can see...
I'm surmising that, for whatever reason, we and the rest of the Hololive Server got transported to the world of Azur Lane. Smack-dab in the middle of a battle, too...
So by Sirens, you mean... Those time-travelers that invaded the world of Azur Lane?!
Never mind that, we've been sent to another world! How the heck do we get back?!
Dammit... If I only had my own fleet with me, this would be a piece of cake!
If only Kawakaze and Zuikaku were here...

sequence: The reflection that is there, but always out of reach
Our battles with destiny most oft end in much the same way
What is real? What is false?
All that remains is a small mystery
So let the tale be told
Will you, perhaps, solve the mystery?

The Tale Begins.say: Noon - Within the Route Escort Fleet
Another commission completed without a hitch!
Nice breeze, calm waves, nice weather all around. I can't wait to get home and take a nap in the sun!
Something wrong, Kawakaze? You're being awfully quiet.
Oh, it's nothing... I was just thinking about my sword. It'll surely start rusting if they continue giving us nothing but escort missions.
I don't mind getting a break from the action. Plus, it's an important job, and someone's gotta do it.
Speaking of breaks, you need to start letting up that poker face if you hope to make friends. Come on, let's see a smile!
It appears to be fog... but there's more to it than that.
My gauges indicate the humidity levels and water temperature in the area are changing rapidly. There also seems to be an island coming into view in the distance.
All signs point toward this being a Mirror Sea. Come on, Sirens! Can't you at least once let us return home in peace?
Detecting numerous mass-produced Siren vessels heading in our direction.
Kawakaze, you watch the front. I'll scramble my planes in the meanwhile so we can take out the Sirens!

The Dense Fog.say: After a few quick skirmishes, the Sirens' reinforcements ceased coming, and the sea turned still once more.
As the two searched for a way to exit the Mirror Sea, the fog before their eyes cleared up almost as quickly as when it formed.
It's almost like the fog itself is a part of the abnormal weather within the Mirror Sea.
Looks like we aren't out of the Mirror Sea yet...
Countless islands appeared before them, and massive artificial structures rose high up above in the far distance.
Upon closer inspection, the islands' flora and the structures appear to be made out of innumerable blocks.
It all looks like a poor replica of the real world in their eyes.
The Sirens' technology never ceases to amaze...
Zuikaku, the weather around us just changed again. It's looking like we'll need to explore the area to find a way out.
I mean, that was pretty obvious to me from the moment we wandered in here.
... You're not afraid of what might happen?
It's fine, we'll get outta here sooner or later. We don't achieve anything by worrying about what we don't know.
And while we're here, might as well investigate to see what the Sirens are planning!

The Call for Help.say: I hear... someone screaming for help!
Kawakaze, we're not the only ones trapped in here!
Understood! I'm counting on your aerial support while I go investigate!

Fubuki and Kawakaze.say: *Pant*... *Pant*... Fubuki, just leave me... I can't take another step…
No, Mio! Don't stop there, you'll–
You've gotta come up with something and help! I don't wanna die here!
We're outnumbered and outgunned... This is looking bleak.
Focus, Fubuki! We can't just give up!
The Sirens' aircraft release their payloads over the fleeing girls.
Mio, I'm glad I at least get to spend my final moments with–
Nobody's dying on my watch! I'll take care of them, so just stay out of danger!

Visitors from Another World.say: Were either of you hurt?
Oh... Oh my God! It's you! It's really you, Kawakaze!
Look, Mio! It's the real Kawakaze!
... What? I don't even get what just happened... But I guess we're saved now?
Squeeee! Look! Those cool eyes, that slender body, that fluffy tail! It's Kawakaze, in the flesh!
Calm down, Fubuki. You're making her uncomfortable.
So here you were. Glad to see you're both all right.
You're here too, Zuikaku?!
Sorry, where are my manners... Ahem, thank you for saving us when we were in danger.
You don't have any rigging from what I can see... But you've got cat ears and know our names... Are you from the Sakura Empire, by any chance?
Cat ears?! Excuse me, can't you see my tail? I'm a fox!
Oh, a fox? S-sorry!
It's no biggie. Anyway... I'm Shirakami Fubuki, the white-haired, animal-eared high-schooler working with Hololive. Many people mistake me for a cat, but I'm 100% a fox!
As for the reason why I know your names, well, that's a long story...
And I'm Ookami Mio, I also work with Hololive. I'm one of the Hologamers, if you want to be specific. Just call me Mio.
"Hololive"? Sounds like an organization, I guess...
I'm Zuikaku, Shoukaku-class aircraft carrier. And this is Kawakaze, Shiratsuyu-class destroyer.
Mhm, I know all about you. I made oaths with both of you, so how could I forget~
... I don't understand what you're talking about.
Seeing as you're unarmed, I assume you're civilians? Did you get caught in the bad weather?
This area's turned into a Mirror Sea and become infested with Sirens. It's really dangerous here, so you should stay close to us.
I honestly don't know how or why we ended up here... But I can say this place looks familiar.
As far as I can tell, this is the Hololive Server, or at least it was made to closely resemble it.
Hololive... server...?
Basically, it's like a secret base of ours. We often bring our friends here to build stuff or hang out.
A secret base? But there was never anything in this area prior to this...
We were just building stuff like usual, then this blinding light appeared outta nowhere... Next thing we know, a Siren fleet is attacking us, and our friends are nowhere to be seen...
... That sounds familiar.
I don't watch much TV, but isn't this like that "isekai anime" trope Ikazuchi mentioned before?
You know about that?!
Meh, wouldn't be the first time it's happened, so I get the gist of it.
Since you know our names, I can only assume we knew each other in the world you came from.
Hah-hah! I know a lot about Azur Lane, in fact!
This is giving me deja vu.
So from what I gather, the Sirens took us all to this place, which for some reason resembles your hideout before they took you here. Right?
Yeah, I guess so.
Fubuki, this'll take ages to explain, so how about we head to the safe house for now?
Safe house? What?
The place where we hid before we got taken here. Follow us and we'll take you there!

The Guide.say: You heard right! It's a place we made before we got transported here, and it somehow carried over. We've got plenty of items stocked, and might be able to resupply you with ammo and stuff!
In other words, there's a high chance this place is a recreation of the world you came from?
Yup, yup. You can see everything from here, including the Hololive headquarters and most other Hololive Server facilities.
Company headquarters, resistance bases... It's starting to sound like you come from a pretty brutal world.
"In a world where a tyrannical company rules over everyone... One group of Hololivers risk everything in their fight against evil... They are... the Resistance!" ... Something like that?
Wherever they're from, it sounds like they're fighting a war.
Uh... not really? I mean, you're not completely wrong, but...
Let's just give them a straight answer, Fubuki.
Basically, one of our friends made this place to get back at our managers. Hololive is just a fun group of people, we're not at war with anyone!
Okay, so if I got it right: you're from a world called Hololive, and live in a place called the Hololive Server, and you like to screw with your kind-of-evil managers?
Now that I look closer... This entire sector of the ocean has become part of the Hololive Server, but the original area has been spread out across all these islands.
Luckily, most of the buildings are intact, so we'll surely find the Resistance base if we follow them.
All right, Hololive Guide, lead the way. We can start hatching a plan once we've made it to your base.

Vestiges of Battle.say: How did you get here, Javelin?
We were on our way back from a commission when suddenly this fog appeared out of nowhere, and suddenly we found ourselves inside a Mirror Sea...
Were there any others in your fleet?
Yeah, there were. Ayanami, Laffey, and Z23 were with me.
We'd better go looking for them then...
Fubuki! Mio! I'm so relieved to see you're okay!
Likewiiiise. I don't know what I would've pooooossibly done if you'd gotten huuuurt. God forbiiiid.
Let me introduce you to my new friend: Javelin!
Are you a Hololive character too?
Yup. I'm Hololive's pure and innocent highschool girl – Natsuiro Matsuri!
And you're Kawakaze, aren't you? I've heard about you before! Listen, I've got a bucket list to check off, so would you mind if I stroked your tail? And could I get a hug? Can we go on a date after?
... If you're from the same place as this Shirakami Fubuki, where did you get your rigging from?
Oh, you mean my shooty bang bang stuff? I got it from Purity!
She's this nice girl in spats who rescued me and Aqua when we were in trouble. She even made us some gear to defend ourselves with!
Purity... A girl in spats... Wait, it can't be...
You know what "can't be"? How pretty she is! You should see her!
She and Aqua stayed behind at the Resistance base to strengthen its defenses while Javelin and I went out to look for people.
Matsuri's mostly right, but there's a bit more to it... We should probably go back to the base for now.

Natsuiro Matsuri, the Flirt.say: Hey, Javelin, let's go on a date once all the fighting is over!
Matsuri, you silly~ I'm not falling for a pickup line like that!
Turned down without a moment's delay... But that's what's so attractive about you!
Oh gosh~! Your flexible preferences in girls is starting to scare me~!
I see Javelin over there. Someone's with her...
Let me guess, it's Lady Thirstsalot...
I wish I could say I don't. She's, uhh... unusual.
Man, I don't get what goes through Fubuki's mind. Whatever, let's go help them out!
You got it! Come on, Kawakaze!

The Resistance Base.say: See that building over there made of sparkling obsidian? That's our base.
How'd you get artillery up there?! This is way beyond the definition of "base," it's a straight-up fort...
Actually, everything above ground is just a decoy, the real base is hidden underwater. You can only enter through a secret entrance, so follow me.
The structure above ground draws attention away from the true fortification below ground... Now I see why you call it a secret base.
I'm honestly amazed that Aqua's and Matsuri's base would come in handy one day. As that one guy said, life's like a box of chocolates.
Alright everyone, take a deep breath and follow me~

Purity?!.say: Captain, we're home~ How're things going?
Hey, Matsuri! You were gone for so long I was starting to worry. Nice to see Fubuki and Mio made it in one piece!
Look at that, Matsuri's back! Good timing, we just finished testing Aqua's rigging. Oh, guessing you brought some friends with you?
Sure did! This here's Shirakami Fubuki, and this is Ookami Mio.
And then the girls who got them out of a tight situation: Kawakaze and Zuikaku. The Resistance grows stronger!
Welcome aboard, folks! We've got fun and games!
You... I remember you, Purifier!
I can take your head in the blink of an eye at this range!
Wait, wait, WAIT! Calm down, you two!
What, Javelin?
Purifier's... lost her memories?
Yeah. I was pretty shocked too when she came in and blew up all the mass-produced Sirens attacking us...
Then I went and saved Aqua and Matsuri and brought them here.
... You're not pretending to be on our side, are you?
She's a Siren. After all the Sirens have done, I'm not going to simply take her word for it.
You have to believe us! Purity would never hurt anyone! You must be confusing her for someone else who looks like her!
I couldn't believe it at first either, but Purifi– I mean, Purity really did save us, and she's on our side...
Uhh, have I horribly wronged some of you in the past? I mean, if you want us to prove our allegiance, I can go out back and commit double suicide with Tessy. We can always get new bodies.
Who's "Tessy"? Wait... Tester's here too?!
Yup... Anyway, we need to come up with a plan for what to do next.
I'll stay with Purifi– Purity, and keep an eye on her.
Thank you, Kawakaze!
These are abnormal circumstances, and I'm willing to accept abnormal things within reason. But don't get careless, Javelin.
Phew, you had me spooked for a second there, Kawakaze... So, all friends here, yeah?
No, this is merely a ceasefire. I'm– Hey, stop that! Why are you measuring them, Purifier?!
Uh, so I can make them some rigging too? Surely getting more people equipped to search for their friends is more important than keeping their 3 measurements a secret?
Search for their friends? There are more than just Fubuki, Mio, Aqua, and Matsuri?
We still haven't found Ayame, Shion, or Miss Sora yet. Wherever they are, I hope they're okay.
Ayame has her demon powers and Shion can use magic, so they're probably fine. Miss Sora, on the other hand... Well, it's Miss Sora, I'm sure she can manage!
Maybe they can, but we're not gonna just leave them to fend for themselves out there.
Sounds like a plan! You girls with riggings go out and look for the last three while yours truly stays behind. Somebody's gotta kit out Fubuki and Mio, after all.
This could end up becoming a drawn-out battle, so we should probably try to collect resources when we can...
Gathering resources is my middle name! Leave it to Lady Aqua~
You girls should take a break, and I'll prepare you some hefty lunches in the meanwhile.
Aww, you're so sweet, Javelin. You'll make a lovely wife one day...
(Once we're back home, I'd better get the rest of the gang to play AL. For now though, time to rest...)

Matsuri, The Ordinary Girl.say: Wow, this rigging is amazing! I never expected weapons this powerful to be so easy to control!
With OP gear like this, even a pure and delicate girl like me can become a ganking queen at the drop of a hat!
(The rigging Purity made doesn't function the same way as ours...)
(Even then, you can't simply equip a ship's rigging and master its use immediately. The Mirror Sea must be affecting her somehow.)
Anyway, now I have the power to protect my friends! Hooray!
Oh yeah, why can't we just get riggings for everyone then face the Sirens head-on?
They might have numbers, but we're way stronger. We'd beat them in the blink of an eye.
There is some truth to that, but reality isn't so simple.
Besides... a world where any random person can pick up arms and go to war is destined to fall to ruin.
Wowie! Kawakaze: cute on the outside, cool on the inside! There's an audience for characters like that, you know!
I can't pull that off, though. I don't know much about your world, and I'm not much of a fighter either, so sorry if I say anything that sounds weird!
You don't know how to fight? I thought you're part of the Resistance?
I've fought a few times before! Just not, you know, like this. Ahahaha~
What a strange place you come from...
Aww, don't be like that! Experience is still experience!

TNT?!.say: That white building is the Holomart. We store all our tools and stuff in there, so it's the best place to start if we wanna get resources.
Actually, I have a question about these supplies...
Whoopsie, I never formally introduced myself!
It's nice to meet you (again.) I'm Minato Aqua, Hololive's local virtual maid!
But just because I'm maid doesn't mean I'm good at housekeeping, that's a stereotype! Video games, however, you bet I am!!!!!
Not much makes sense in this world I've been thrust into, but I can tell you what I DO know!

We kept water, food, and medicine stockpiled in our hideout back in the Hololive Server, which have all carried over, but for some reason we've also got ammunition that conveniently works with our riggings just lying around!
That, and blocks of TNT. They work slightly differently compared to back on the Hololive Server, but they still explode just as well!
Back then I figured I'd need them at some point, so I hid stores of them all over the place, although I'm not sure if they're still there...
Anyhoo, this place you call a "Mirror Sea" seems to be similar to the Hololive Server in a lot of ways!
And since blocks of TNT are the most powerful item available on the Hololive Server, I suggest you collect as much of it as you can!!!!!!!
From what I understand based on Fubuki's explanation, Hololive is a talent agency that recruits and oversees "Vtubers," as she called them.
So, if you are performers of some sort, why do you have massive amounts of TNT lying around?
"Talent agency"... I mean...
Don't worry about the TNT too much, just think of it as an everyday item! We need it to construct buildings, you see.
You build houses out of dynamite...? What a peaceful world you come from if explosives make the foundations of your buildings...
Uhh... sure! Let's not worry about the details and just focus on the big picture!
But, if we're to collect this TNT as we supposedly should, we'll need to clear out the Sirens in the area first.
That's easy peasy~ Let's rev up our engines and do it!

Request for Support.say: Hold, Matsuri. I'm receiving a message from Zuikaku.
Siren aircraft are bombing "a giant wooden castle." Target is believed to be one of the Hololivers. Heading there to provide support.
... End of transmission. Seems we've located one of your friends.
Giant wooden castle...? Wait, that sounds like... Nakiri Castle! Ayame should be there! We'd better go help her!

Nakiri Castle.say: On the horizon – across the many islands scattered about the Mirror Sea – sits an isolated castle. Its structure wooden, its surroundings silent.
Its purpose, unclear. Perhaps to defend a strategic position, or symbolize its owner's control over the area.
Regardless, the Sirens have their destructive eyes fixated upon it.
And soon, it might fall to ruin by their hand.
I thought we'd be safe in your castle, but it seems I've been proven wrong...
Ay only come to this server to build things! Why must such wanton destruction befall my creations?!
The Sirens are behind this...
Sirens...? You mean the ones from that game Fubuki plays?
Are you saying that this is a video game world?!
We need to get out of here! Ayame, why would you make a castle this big without constructing a secret escape route?!
Twas designed with everyday activities in mind! 'Tis for raising animals, growing crops, and lounging around!
Ay never suspected a siege to happen, much less there be a need for a hidden passage!
Welp... We're screwed, then.
It's okay. I can take care of the Sirens.
Excuse me?! You two against an army?
Well said! Ay shall join them! These "Sirens" shall learn the sharpness of my blades!
It's too dangerous for you. You don't have any rigging.
Shion, Ayame, you're not trained to fight. Ayanami and I can do it.
B-but...
You don't need to worry. We're experienced with fighting them.
Dunno why, but they have a lot of carriers... That works in our favor.
Yes. If we can launch a surprise attack on them, it will be easy!

Reinforcements.say: Then you've got awesome friends! Look at them fighting carriers many times their size without any hesitation!
I've never seen a Siren fleet composed only of carriers and no backup. This Mirror Sea is making them behave differently...
No matter, we must take care of them. Matsuri, I'll need your support.

Grouping Up.say: Waaaaahhhh! Thank the sorcery gods you're here, Matsuri...
Aww, don't cry, Shion. Everything's fine now. You were really brave, weren't you...
We wouldn't have made it here were it not for your help, Ayanami and Laffey. You have my gratitude.
Don't thank us. We couldn't stand by and do nothing.
Now that we've found you two, only one left to find is Miss Sora.
Let us not forget Z23. I hope they're both unharmed out there.
Despicable Sirens, how dare they do this to my castle...
Don't be sad, Ayame! Once the fighting's over, we can build a new one, with blackjack and booze! We have the technology!
We shall! And this time, Ay will make sure to build a hidden passage!

The Plot Thickens.say: My condolences, Z23 from Azur Lane, but you must die.
Hold on a second, Aqua, I think you may have things backwards!
I'm pretty sure Fubuki once told me those Sirens behind you are the enemy in Azur Lane, not this girl.
You're mistaken, Miss Sora. I will explain everything after I've dealt with this one.
We'll be surrounded before long! Sora, we should flee immediately!
(Javelin... Laffey... Ayanami... Wherever you are, I hope you're okay...!)

Two Aquas?.say: ... It sounds like Kawakaze has managed to group up with Nakiri and Shion.
Great to hear! Though we still don't know where Miss Sora is...
I'm just wondering: is she particularly famous? You don't seem to address anyone else in your group with "Miss," so...
That's because she was one of the first members of Hololive! And since we joined later and she always looks after us, we give her that bit of extra respect.
Like how I respect my sister Shoukaku... Although she can be kind of mean from time to time.
Hm? My recon planes have found a familiar face! Let's see...
Apparently. At least someone who looks like you. There's someone else there with brown hair!
That has to be Sora! But why am I there? That's impossible!!!

Yamada Hermione.say: Hmm, isn't this Shirakami Shrine, a.k.a. Fubuki's place? Ah, there she is! I see her!
Sora, over here!
Huh? Aqua? But you're over here, and over there... why are there multiple Aquas?
Sora, look out! That maid is an imposter created by the Sirens!
Nuh-uh, she's the imposter! Look, Sora, I'm the real one!
Wh-whaaat?
The Sirens have already made a copy of Aqua?!
A... copy?
The Sirens can make clones out of anyone that enters waters they control, like a mirror reflection of them. That's why they're called Mirror Seas.
But the clones only LOOK like someone else, and still follow the Sirens' orders. Just knock 'em down like bowling pins!
Zuikaku, there's more to it! That Aqua clone is different!
What...?
Hahahah... My name is Yamada Hermione. I have awaited your arrival, as per orders of my master, the ruler of time and space.
"Ruler of time and space"? What the heck?!
Who's that? Is it the Siren that messed this place up?!
Perhaps, perhaps not... Ahahah, you need not know who it is.
Now remain still as I do as my master instructed and end your lives.
Stop it, Aqua!
Please do not interfere, Miss Sora. It is my duty to kill these people.
Aqua would never say something crazy like that!
Would she not...? You're mistaken, because...
I'm Aqua, too!!!
... This is why the Sirens' pawns are such a pain. Aqua, if you can't fight someone who looks just like you, I can take care of her.
"Yamada Hermione"?! You cheeky Siren bastard! I'm a battle-hardened combat maid who's played through more hardcore games than you can even imagine! Don't you dare make fun of me!
You're going DOWN! Let's beat the everliving crap out of this literal nobody!!!

First Victory.say: After eliminating the imposter spawned by the Mirror Sea, all the members of Hololive and Azur Lane safely managed to regroup.
They brought with them the supplies they had gathered to the Resistance hideout, and spent the rest of their day there.
Inside the Hololive Resistance Base
So when you defeated the Aqua clone, she instantly turned to light and vanished?
Hang on... Doesn't that sound like she used the teleport command we have on the server?
Oh, you're kidding... You mean Tessy's assumed direct control of the server?
Tessy? Ah, that girl who looked like Tester...
Yeah. She's behaving really weird, just like Purifier. But unlike her, Tester is still evil...
That means there's a high chance that Tester is that alleged "ruler of time and space"... Oh, right, how are you Hololivers doing? Everything all right?
We're A-OK! Ayame and Shion didn't seem keen on fighting at first, but they're pretty eager now that they've gotten the hang of it!
Th-they're the enemy, Matsuri! Of course Ay will fight them with all Ay have!
Y-you said it! Aqua's enjoying herself too, so what's the big deal?
Ah, classic Gammadion Gang. Like three peas in a pod.
About the Sirens... Do you fight them all the time in this world?
Correct. They are our enemies and threaten the safety of our sea lanes.
We were created for the purpose of fighting the Sirens and driving them back.
Although I have another duty: to protect Nagato, the shrine maiden of the Sakura Empire.
Sorry. I didn't intend to make the conversation so serious.
Anyway, I suspect the Sirens will extract the data from your riggings to create more of their pawns. Your riggings were made here, after all.
You should expect to have to fight more enemies that look like one of your own.
Ahahahah, all we need to do is smack 'em down and put an end to whatever scheme the Sirens are trying to pull!
Then we'll find Tester– sorry, Tessy, and solve the mystery behind the Hololive Server. Then we'll get you Hololivers home!
But that's for tomorrow! Right now, we need to all get some sleep.

At Nighttime.say: Even knowing they're just copycats, fighting enemies that look like your allies takes its toll on you. I would know.
But for them, it's even worse. This place their home, and this base looks just like one they put so much effort into making.
Which is why I feel guilty about making them go to battle amidst all this.
I don't like doing it, but we're all in this together. Our mutual trust will help us get through it. Right, Kawakaze?
If you're concerned about them, just ask how they're faring.
Late at night - Outside the Resistance Base
Whew... I've gotta say, the sea breeze feels nice~
If we meet that Aqua clone again...
I guess we've got no choice but to fight her...
But... can I actually do it? Can I fight someone who looks like her, even knowing she's the enemy? What if they make clones out of everyone...
Will I... be able to do anything?

Forming the Team.say: The following day
Now, let's continue from the last strategy discussion we held.
Go ahead, teacher!
Go ahead, teacher!
I'm not a teacher, just a facilitator! *Sigh*... Let's start with Purifi– excuse me, Purity, who has something to say.
So yeah, everyone's been talking about "solving the mystery of the Mirror Sea" and stuff. If you wanna do that, just get to the foundation of it.
Its "foundation"?
You heard me. I don't mean foundation as in the bottom of this ocean sector or whatever, but the foundation behind the very concept of the Mirror Sea. Don't ask why, I just know.
Meaning, we'll find a way to turn the Mirror Sea back to normal when we get to the foundation of the Hololive Server?
Hmm... The foundation of the Hololive Server... Maybe she means the Hololive Headquarters? Would make sense, as we're all part of Hololive.
Actually... Zuikaku sent her recon planes to scout the area, and didn't find any building that appears to be a headquarters.
We did find a massive maze that wasn't there yesterday, though.
Massive maze? You mean the labyrinth I made?
Sounds to me like we might find something there!
Let's do it! We might find some sort of clue in there!
Or walk haphazardly into a hazard... but it's better than having no leads to follow. Zuikaku, I suggest we explore the maze.
Seems to be our only choice... Hololivers, I'd like you to handle communications and base defense, and we'll explore the–
I appreciate the courtesy, but I want to go into battle too.
Yes, but...
And I wanna go with Fubuki! Besides, I made the labyrinth in the first place and know where all the traps are. I'll be your guide!
True, your familiarity with it would be good to have.
Okay, then I'm going–
We can't ALL sortie. Someone must remain here and keep an eye on the base and keep it functional.
Aww, I was just going to swear on my name that I'd find the headquarters building before anyone else.
Now, now, it's equally important to keep everything running, Aqua.
Ayanami, Javelin, stay here and watch the base.
Okay, we will.
Can I go? Please! Pretty please!
You're staying behind, Purity. Owing to your memory loss, we can't fully trust you.
Bawww...
All right, let's get to our respective tasks! We'll break free of this Mirror Sea together!
Yeeeeah!

The Chaotic Labyrinth.say: I thought the labyrinth had only gotten bigger, but somebody's added new traps and ambush areas. What was originally the safe way through has become littered with traps...
And it's all made from the ocean... If only we could simply swim beneath it. Go down where it's wetter, down where it's better.
Whoever remodeled the labyrinth must be familiar with how it was originally like...
That leaves few candidates as to who it might be.
A clone of Mio, I suppose... Would make sense if she was the keeper of this place.
But if someone went through all the trouble of changing the labyrinth, that might mean we're on the right track.
If the key to solving the mystery of the Mirror Sea really does lie in here, then the enemy must be ready to protect it fiercely. Stay on your guards.
You got it. I'm pumped up and ready to take on this chump of a pawn!
Don't tempt fate with one-liners like that, Mio...

Matryoshka.say: Heh, okay, we've gotta go right at the next junction.
Wait here. The path marked with a platter is the right one.
I'm surprised we're making so much progress...
That's thanks to Z23's idea! "If you were to remodel the labyrinth, how would you do it?"
Everything falls into place when I view it from the perspective of what my clone would do.
We'll get to the end of this maze in no time at this rate!

Game Characters.say: It's just as the cards said... They'll get here no matter what I do to try to stop them.
I bid you welcome. I am the fortuneteller Miokawa Iiyo, otherwise known as Intelligence Mionnu.
Hang on, I recognize her... That's Mio's character from when we were playing tabletop RPGs!
Ay had a feeling things would turn out this way when Ay saw that platter symbol...
Surrender while you still can! You have no chance of winning when there are this many of us.
I would certainly like to, but...
I have my orders from the ruler of time and space, and I cannot simply surrender...
Listen, I'm really sorry, but I just have to defeat you.
Then try it...!
Before the Mio clone could even move a muscle, Kawakaze came lunging at her.
The glint of her sword forms a beautiful arch, and just as her blade was about to bisect the imposter...
(You're mine...!)
SMASH!
I'm afraid that won't work...…
She stopped Kawakaze's attack by breaking a platter?!
She's a fortuneteller, so she can do things like that.
Hrmh! If that's how you want it!
Realizing her first attack failed, Kawakaze pulls back and launches her torpedoes. However...
Oh come on! She can stop torpedoes with them too?!
Considering she has 75 points invested in her Throwing stat, yeah...
Mio, why'd you even allocate her stats in such a weird way?
She only appeared in like, one game! I didn't expect her to show up again in the future!
Kawakaze, look out!
BOOOOOM!
Kawakaze is entirely focused on Iiyo, and doesn't notice the attack coming at her from the shadows.
Not on my watch!
Miss Sora!
Sora knocks Kawakaze out of the way and the blocks the shell with her rigging.
It's... it's fine! The rigging Purity made is sturdier than you'd think... Looks like that came in handy!
I owe you my thanks...
Listen, clones! I'm in charge of protecting these people, and I'm not letting you lay a finger on them!
Hmph. So you blocked it.
Thanks for showing up, Nakiri.
Ohohohoh! Well met, my otherworldly adversaries! My name is Kakitsubata Nakiri. As you can see, Ay am but a simple highschool girl with a noble upbringing.
Don't let her appearance fool you! She might look dainty, but she's built like a muscle mountain and has 70 points in her Punching stat!
Ay haven't the faintest idea what it is you're talking about, dear.
Tallyho, Iiyo. It is time to show them what we are made of.

Conquerors of the Labyrinth.say: Guess we never stood a chance...
Oh, blast it...
They did it again! They used the teleport command!
And they did so at the last possible moment... Is this some sort of automatic safety feature the server has?
Hrm... I know they're just clones the Sirens made, but it's still hard to get myself to fight them.
That said, I might be able to go all out if always get teleported away right before their HP hits 0. I'm not about to let an imposter beat me.
Hmh, as someone once said: a faker will never be anything more than a faker...
But it's annoying that we can't reduce their numbers. They'll wear us down over time if they simply retreat, heal, and come back to fight us again.
We need only take out their stronghold before it comes to that.
(Sora seems a lot more resolute than she was yesterday... That's reassuring.)
I'm done being hesitant. From now on, my mind is set: we'll put a stop to the Sirens' schemes and end this whole ordeal.
I'm getting fed up with fighting all these clones...
I understand. Fighting clones of yourself is one thing, but it's rather distressing to fight those of your close friends.
The Sirens have always played dirty like that. Once we get back, Purity's getting an earful from me!
From me too...
I can hear you, ya know!
Whuah?! Why are you contacting us all of a sudden, Purity?
Zed, how is it going on your end?
We walked into an ambush, but we dealt with the Sirens and were just going to resume our search. What about the base, everything fine there?
The base is functioning as normal.
While the base is fine, there's this black veil that suddenly appeared out of nowhere! I think it's expanding, and coming from the labyrinth, actually...
What?!
Look up, everyone!
Just as Javelin said, there's a veil floating in the air above the labyrinth.
Or rather, it's in the sky. It spans across the ocean, enveloping everything in its path.
That's not a veil, it's a barrier! And unbelievably strong one, at that! I hit it with everything I have, yet it didn't as much as cut a hole into it!
This is obviously an impassable wall the GM made that we can't pass through without permission...
We can't go forward like this...
It seems we have no choice but to fall back for the time being...
Say, if we can't go by air or by sea...
Then I might have a good solution to the problem...

Matsuri's Plan.say: And with this, the Resistance will have their hands tied behind their backs. Well done, Fubu– I mean, my "Advisor."
Don't worry. Those fools have no way to break the barriers created by your energy generator.
However, this Mirror Sea's control unit has a tendency to disobey me.
Is that because... full authorization has not been granted yet?
Look there. This device has not fully acknowledged me. Me, Tester, the manipulator of space and time! The one who rules these seas!
This must be the result of a prior faulty experiment. If you activate more of its functions, surely authorization will be restored.
Most likely. In that case, I will leave the defense of the perimeters to you, "Advisor."
After teaming up to defeat the fake Ookami Mio, Azur Lane and the Hololive members found themselves hindered again by some sort of barrier.
At that time, Hololive's Natsuiro Matsuri proposed a completely unprecedented strategy.
We'll just go underneath it!
Huh? That's impossible! Aqua won't be able to go through the route that the other Mio told us about because of her submarine equipment!
There's no way we'll be able to get through the water! The barrier also extends underneath the surface, so it's a dead end!
I wonder if this extends all the way to the bottom of the sea...
That's why we're not going underwater. We're going to be going underground.
Underground? Do you plan to dig a tunnel?
Wait, what... No way... You're kidding, right?
Aqua, Shion, what will you two do?
If you dig over there, you'll probably just end up in "the cemetery"...
The cemetery...?
Ahem! ... That's just how Shion describes it! Its actual name is "Dark Hololive." It's a secret base filled with all sorts of traps.
But it's a haunted mansion!!
(Ignore)
... In any case, according to the new intel we've collected, the Mirror Sea built from "Holoserver" is much larger than the original.
That's right. The earth and the sky... This place is a lot bigger than the Holoserver we know.
In other words, if we use the secret passageway that was originally located underneath the seabed, we should be able to pass through the barrier!
Hmm, if it's the Tessy that I know... No, she wouldn't extend the barrier all the way into the lava.
I suppose this is the best bet we have right now. It's worth a try.
That settles it! Our objective is to get to Dark Hololive! Let's begin the operation!

Dark Hololive.say: With everyone's hard work, the huge diamond cross marking the base's entrance was quickly located.
After much deliberation, Aqua and Shion remained inside the base while the others split up into a forward group and support group.
I wasn't going to ditch~ There's other stuff I could be doing, like expanding the base's defences or reinforcing the walls, right?
You guys like keeping me behind the scenes, right?
... Thanks to you, the Resistance base's defenses are so strong that nobody can even touch it anymore...
Motion-sensing attack automata, a labyrinth of traps, and the TNT block cannon generated by those green villagers... Ahh, it's all so exciting!
We made the right decision to bring her with us...
Even if you're not able to help out here, don't think you're dead weight.
Anyways, let's start by exploring. Purifier, help out as well.
But, I'm a Siren, you know? Who knows what I might do if things get a little chaotic here~
We want you to help precisely because you're a Siren! Experience withstanding, it's always more efficient to use boss characters whenever you get the chance!
If you wish to get under Tessy's skin as well then you may certainly join us, Purity.
That decides it. We'll have you help, even if you don't want to.
Well, I was getting tired of sitting around crafting stuff anyway. If you're going to say that much, it wouldn't kill me to help out.

Test of a Soul's Worth.say: "Are you sure about this?" "I don't think you're going to make it." "Hell lies just ahead, all right?"
What's up with these signs...?
It's a totally different atmosphere with everyone together~~
Wait a sec... the signs I made should have said "You still can make it!" and "There's always next time!"...
Does that mean...
Natsuiro Matsuri, answer me! Among the Hololive girls, who do you love the most?
Who is it?!
Is that... a Matsuri imposter?!
Imposter? If you're the real deal, then you should be able to answer this question. Now, answer me! Among the Hololive girls, who do you love the most?
Um...
You can't answer, can you? Matsuri, you know what that means...
Well, if you suddenly ask me something like that... my answer is this!
Gyahh?!
Woah, she pulled out her rigging and started firing?!
I was... deceived...? Impossible!!
I could have said "I love them all," or "I can't decide," but... actions speak louder than words!
I'll solve the mystery of the Mirror Sea, defeat you and the other imposters, and take everyone home to Hololive!
If you plan to get in my way, then Natsuiro Matsuri will dance with you - with everything she has!
Woah, I don't know what just happened, but she started pulling out inspirational one-liners?!
Everyone, prepare for battle!

Unusual Friendship.say: Her firepower wasn't particularly strong, but...
What tremendous resilience... she just revives again after being defeated...
Nnnngh... haaah.... Nnnngh... haah...
Just when I've been reborn into a world filled with cute girls... I refuse to fall here!
Matsuri, I believe in you!
Ohhhhhhh!!
Fubuki's support just gave both of them a burst of energy?!
Oooohhhhhh!!
Oh no... the fake Matsuri is powering up even more...
Eh... Huh?
Fubuki! Fubuki! Fubuki! Fubuki!! Aaahhhnnn!!
Wait! W-w-wait a sec! Time out!
Siren! Even if you're going to make me look bad... there's a time and place for it, as well as a target!
There are plenty of people on stream spamming stuff like "Big Sister Matsuri~" or "I love your character, Matsuri," so why are you going to such lengths?!
Fubuki, do you like Matsuri?
Ehh?! Laffey, why are you asking me that all of a sudden... Oh, I see! That's the key to this battle!
Matsuri, I love you~♡
AHH!!!
She turned into a statue.
She let her guard down!
With a single decisive blow, Kawakaze struck down the fake Matsuri.
She turned into light and disappeared...
Ay am not detecting any other enemies. Is this what it's like to have a radar...?
Let's continue onward, everyone~ Lead the way, Matsuri. Matsuri?
The Matsuri over here turned into a statue as well...

Haunted Mansion.say: Advisor, it seems that the Resistance has traversed the barrier using a different route.
Oh, and you don't need to bother teleporting these pawns back all the time. I'm the ruler of time and space; as long as I have direct control over the Mirror Sea, I don't need an army...
My apologies. I shall ready the next line of defense.
Even with the ability to teleport, I fear that we are only feeding them experience, allowing them to become even more powerful.
Moreover, with the current level of authorization, it is difficult to create something significantly stronger than they are.
This whole authorization thing is such a pain...
Returning to the barrier...
All right! We've gotten through the barrier!
Heheh~ See that sign over there? The room right by it is full of amazing stuff!
... Huh? By the way, Javelin and Aqua are headed straight for that room.
Uh-
Wh-wh-wh-whaaaaat is thaaaaaaat?!?!
My name's written on this sign. And inside the room, there's... my head?
Nooooo...! Shion doesn't want to be trapped inside anymore...
AAAAAAAAAAAAAAHHHHH!!!!!
If Atago was here, she'd take this thing down in one hit...
I'm so sorry! I never expected that the Hololive horror room would be reproduced to this degreeeeee!
And uh... especially, the door traps... Um, watch your heads...
Matsuri, you have what it takes to be a horror game maker.
It's too much for me to take... My stomach... Blaaarghh...
Ughh... You're a jerk, Matsuri...!!
I feel like the past Aquas are looking down on me from the skies, watching me waving my arms...
I agree that might have been overdoing it... Guh...
I'm sorry! Deeply sorry!
We won't be able to move forward until everyone recovers... Ahahaha...

Lava Zone?!.say: The barrier above us seems to have disappeared.
Since we passed through the barrier, there would be no point for Tester to waste the energy to keep it going.
Th-thank goodness... I never want to go through that room ever again.
This place is also pretty spacious. Where's the Headquarters building?
Let's send out our recon planes as usual... Um, huh? How come I can't call them out?
It seems that our aircraft can only fly near the surface of the ocean. We're in trouble now... how are we going to find our way?
Everyone, look at the ocean! Is that... obsidian... and lava?!
By lava, do you mean magma? Is a hotspot suddenly forming above the ocean?
That's simply impossible in our world! There's no way for magma to just show up on the ocean!
No matter how powerful the Sirens are, they've never been able to casually violate the laws of nature!
Ah, is that tower-like building the observation deck that Matsuri created?
If we get onto that observation deck, we'll be able to survey the sea and its surroundings.
Well, I don't know how much farther we're going to be able to see...
But doing something is better than doing nothing.

Enemy Sora.say: In the blink of an eye, Kawakaze drew forth her guns and aimed them at the enemy.
Your movements are skilled, but you still have much to learn~
She managed to deflect my attack, huh?
This shield even has a little red bean pastry design on it. Isn't it cute~?
She's relaxed... she is probably a formidable enemy...
Are you... a "mirror image" made by the Sirens?
There's nothing to be surprised about. That part of your personality will only hold you back when we fight, other "me."
I'll make sure to keep improving myself!
Is that... Miss Sora over there? The enemy is giving off a completely different vibe...
Don't let your guard down. These pawns are completely under the Sirens' command.
Correct. That is why it falls upon me to stop you.
"You're not our ally? So you're the enemy, then?" Ahahaha! I always wanted to try saying that!
It's really going to come down to this, huh? Fine then. Everyone, get ready for battle! Don't hesitate!
Come at me with everything you have. I will not lose here!

Combat Guidance?.say: Ayame, your main guns are far to inaccurate. When attacking, consider the overall balance of your equipment.
Y-yes!
Shion, controlling your aircraft is certainly important, but you must remember to observe your surroundings.
I see! Thank you, Sora!
Explosions are going off all around her, so why is she talking like she's pulling the strings here?
We're completely at her mercy...
Wh-what's with that incredible gravitas...
My being was made with you as a template. If you strive to improve yourself, you will be able to surpass me one day. However, you'll have to defeat me here first.
Eh? Um, I'll do my best!
Even the real Miss Sora is getting caught up by her?!
Thanks to the help of everyone in Azur Lane, you've all learned how to control your riggings.
Oh, and Aqua? Did you just poke fun of me with one of my own lines?
E-eh?
"SO YOU'RE THE ENEMY, THEN?"
Eep?!
I'm sorry, Miss Sora, I'm so very sorry! I'm so sorry, so please don't bomb me. I'm sorry! I'm very, very sorry!
Nope, not good enough~♪
AAAAAAAAAAAAAHHHH!!!!!
Sh-she subdued everyone, all by herself...?!
A strong enemy...!
She's nothing like the other clones we've faced!
Heeh~ Purity doesn't really know what's going on, but for an enemy to be this strong, surely there's some external factor involved? For example, an energy supply or something~
But... I'm not seeing anything of the sort!
I saw something flashing red on her riggings early.
You're right! Look, it's getting faster!
Time's up... Regrettably, it's your win this time.
Umm, I have a message from the ruler of space and time herself. "Everyone, keep going and don't stop for anything!"
In a flash of light, the clone of Tokino Sora disappeared.
A narrow victory, I suppose...
It appears that we were handed this one...
But, that means we at least can move on, right...
I'm sorry! I'm very sorry! I got ahead of myself! I'm so very sorry...
It's okay, Aqua. Here, here. *pats*
As expected, there was an amplification device. Moreover, this was a custom device attuned for this specific part of the Mirror Sea.
(... Well done, Tessy! I didn't think you'd be able to activate all these functions so quickly!)
If large numbers of enemies are equipped with these things, we won't stand a chance.
Hmm... we won't have time to slowly look around then...

Roller Coaster.say: It looks like the experimental device was a success.
The short time limit is its main disadvantage, but it is, without a doubt, very effective at enhancing combat power.
With a little more fine tuning, I'll be able to equip my mass-produced "Pieces" with these devices, Holoserver will also fall into my dominion over time and space!
Indeed. This device is proof that you're gradually gaining control of the server. Once you've cleared all the authorizations, the Resistance will no longer pose any threat to you.
That would be wonderful. I'll continue working then. I'll entrust you with the countermeasures.
Meanwhile...
Ahahahaha! HAHahah! Finally... we've finally found it! The Hololive headquarters! Let's go, Hololive Resistance!
Aqua's finally back to her old self.
It's fine to scout things out from the observation deck, but we still have to make our way over to the HQ building.
The lava flow area is expanding... *gasp*! Is this the Sirens' defense system?!
Are the Sirens planning to drown this entire area with magma?
That is a possibility... We won't be able to reach the HQ building without crossing the sea first...
It's like we were playing on creative mode before, but now we're on survival mode!
Everyone! We found lots of TNT blocks on the observatory island!
20 boxes of TNT! Add this to what we already have, and we'd be able to blow away half of the original Holoserver!
Huh? Did something like that happen before...?
What's the matter, Zed? You look deep in thought.
Mm. I'm glad we have a supply of TNT blocks, but how are we going to get them over to the HQ building?
With all this lava being blown around, we won't be able to use our planes, as they won't be able to maintain altitude.
Hmm? In that case, let's use this roller coaster that Shion and I made. We called it, the "MioShio Coaster!"
A few other friends helped with to build it. When the weather is clear, the view from the top is unbelievable.
Ooh, a roller coaster! I've always wanted to ride one with the Commander!
Javelin, take this more seriously! ... The MioShio, huh? Where do I get on this roller coaster?
There should be an entrance near the observation deck! I'll go look for it!

The Broken Entrance.say: ... And they've all been destroyed by the Sirens...
They searched for the entrance to the roller coaster, but all three had been completely destroyed by the Sirens.
It feels like they're always a step ahead of us... the Sirens must have some really brilliant tactician on their side...
This destruction was wrought not with gunfire or explosives...
Are you saying it would look like this if I blasted it with my magic?
If it's not our Shion, then that should be our next hint.

A Normal Shion?.say: That's the end of the line for you, imposter! How dare you blow up the roller coaster that I made!
She has spaces between her name again! I have a bad feeling about this!
MatsuriMatsuriMatsuriii! Ahhhh! Ahhh! MatsuriMatsuriMatsuri! *sniff* *sniff* Haaaaah.... haaaah...!
Eeehhhhh? Stop! Stop that this instant!
Oh? It's Shion this time. How cute!
Does Shion sometimes act like this too?!
Those were truly dark times! Forget you ever saw this!
This is a recycled plot. The Sirens must be punished.
Neeeeee! Stop staring and help me stop this thing!
You haven't had enough yet? But it's not a problem! I still... have another trump card!
Eh? You're going to get even cringier?!
I have something to prove after all! Matsuri, you're so cute! I love you! I love you so much...

0 MP.say: C'mon, pay attention when people are talking to you, you grade schooler baby!
Who're you calling a grade schooler?! You STUPID MORONIC IDIOT!
Farewell, Honest Shion...
The hell are you bidding farewell to my clone for?! I'll destroy you!
Huh? That's it? I thought she'd stick around for longer.
This was the weakest enemy we've ever met.
It might have been weaker than the fake Aqua we met at the beginning.
Huh?! We're talking about the enemy! Shouldn't you be happy that the enemy's weak?
For some reason, it seems that the fake versions of all of us, Miss Sora excluded, have just been the victims of public executions...
Ahh, that's because all of these are facets that we've broadcasted of ourselves.
We still haven't encountered a fake version of me... Exactly what kind of character could it be... I'm become scared to find out...
It's a bit hard to come out and say this, but don't you guys feel that this is really a bit like reaping what you guys have sowed...?
Heeeh~ That's totally strange~ I wonder which aspect of Purifier I'm supposed to reflect~
... Haven't you just lost your memories. It's not like it makes any difference regardless of what kind of character you're supposed to be.
If it wasn't for this situation at hand, there's absolutely no way we'd be cooperating with you, who are a Purifier.
I will have you know that the moment you make the smallest movement with the intention of harming my comrades, my blade will have cleaved your very soul from your body.
Yeah, yeah. But seriously, I'm totally intrigued by this~ Y'know, stuff like passionate, INTEEEEEEENSE friendship, or a burning, intense development, or somethin'?
Save the sleeptalking for when you're asleep.
Anyway, thinking about Fake Shion's combat power, I think they should be/are likely to be avoiding direct combat with us.
So basically, what you're saying is that our encounters here were all by chance, and that there are probably other entrances out there.
I think I can sense some hope now!
Yep yep, it's still waaay too early to be giving up. There are still other entrances, so let's search other places for them!

The MioShio Coaster.say: It seems that Resistance brats have discovered an entrance that hasn't been destroyed yet. That's a huge failure, right, Advisor?
As far as I know, the damaged "pieces" that have taken damage during this time have yet to finish being repaired. What do you plan to do?
Please rest assured. Everything is still going just as planned.
We have already swapped out the rails for the rollercoaster. The destination of the Resistance will not be the headquarters, but instead, in a pit of magma.
Hmm, making the first move was a very good move.
It is because I have studied "Zhuge Liang's Strategems" very thoroughly. This time, I have prepared an ambush for the Resistance. Please continue to focus wholly on taking back power.
THE ROLLER COASTER IS A MILLION TIMES COOLER THAN BEFORE IT BECAME BIGGERRRRRRRRRRRR!
(A roller coaster that floats in the sky... What a strange device.)
(Next time, let's build a roller coaster at the naval base. Zed, get on.)
(I-I really don't want to so I'll pass!)
(Like I thought. I really don't fit in.)
(It's good to let your guard down from time to time.)

Disaster.say: We're almost at the last stop.
Huh...? What's that building that looks like a rice ball?
Rice ball?! Ohnoohnoohnoohno! Underneath the rice ball is a lake of magma!
Huh? This isn't the destination that's marked on the map...? Matsuri, you told me you were completely sure about the specificatio... Wahhhhhh!
Was it a trap laid out by the Sirens?! Wait, how are we supposed to escape from this high speed rotating... awawawa!
Zuikaku!
With all this rotation, even if I launch carrier-based planes, we won't be able to grab hold of them!
Ey everyone, don't panic, and grab hooold of my rigging~
Aaaahhhhh!
Purity's rigging!
Even though I have memory loss, I still remember how to take this bad boy out~ Weeell, I never expected to be useful in a pinch, though~
Purifier, amazing.
Ahahaha! It's fine to keep singing my praises!
T-To be saved by a Siren...! How am I supposed to report on this to the Commander...
Sora, everyone, are you okay?!
Everyone's safe! But you know, that train, it's completely submerged in the magma...
First, we should get off Purity's rigging and land... eh? Is that... a wall? And a huge mural...?
That mural... isn't it a bit different from the ones from before?
The Sora inside the mural is equipped with her rigging!
The Matsuri on the wall, is well-developed in certain places...
Like I thought, this is different from the "pieces" we've encountered so far.
I feel like it's strange to just treat them as "enemies."
While it is our duty as warships to defeat Sirens, I have no desire to force you all to cooperate in doing so.
Nay, these were merely past fragments of ourselves, so there is no reason to be so considerate of us.
Well, thinking on the bright side, if we defeat the Boss of the Sirens, everything will return back to normal, so if we try hard, we should be able to avoid battles.
... Sorry for making you help out.
I lost my way for a little bit, but... no longer. If I have no choice but to defeat them in order to take everyone back safely... I'll do it!
Heehee, a strategy like this? Too easy~. When you think that it will be impossible, just leave it to the Amazing Aqua!
I... eh, Matsuri?
Yeup, I think I might have an idea!

It's Time to Duel!.say: I'm terribly sorry for bothering you guys when you're all so pumped up, but...
Hehehe. The one known as the Advisor, the Great Detective Fubuki, has arrived to stop you all in your tracks.
THE ONE THE SIRENS COPIED ACTUALLY ENDED UP BEING THIS TROUBLESOME ONE AFTER ALL!
Master Detective Fubuki... So you're the one who was hindering us all along!
The fake sign on the barrier and the lava trap, was it all your doing?!
I simply gave them some advice. Others executed for me.
It takes some guts for an advisor like you to appear at the front lines, alone. You're not here to surrender, are you?
No way~ Oh, Kawakaze, you're such a joker~ This game is in its last stages anyway, so I felt that it'd be good to make my appearance around now.
Everything that's happened until now. Hey, don't zone out on me now.
This is the shadow game the magnificent me developed after researching the games that the ship girls were playing!
Th-This is...! Everyone's being swallowed into a mysterious spatial blister?
This is a battle of wits befitting an advisor! Now, choose your deck, Hololive Resistance!
This is our only option... I'll accept your challenge, Master Detective!

Shadow Duel.say: I send Shion to the Resistance base, place a taunt counter on Purity, and end my turn.
Eh?! Me?! Wait a sec! Why am I being forced to be the tank?!
As expected from someone who usually plays games, you've already picked up on the rules.
But how's this? The field spell, "Sea of Lava," taps Purity with its effect! I also use Mirror Sea's National Power 4 to activate "Siren Technology: Mass Production!"
On top of that, I use "Coin" to discard two 1 mana cost "Mass Production Model"s, and fulfilling the cost for Star and Moon, I increase my Link rating to 3.
I don't really get it, but you've been the only one playing since we started!
Solitaire is a developer's privilege! Return to me, Yamada Hermione, Kakitsubata Nakiri, and Miokawa Iiyo!
I see... with this, I completely understand the combo! Arise, my vanguard, "Archangel Aqua!" Ignition Overdrive!
Aqua! Watch out! Fauxbuki still has one evolution left!
Is this possibly Hololive's trump card...!
You're too late! Due to the damage, burst activates, "The Great Detective Fubuki's Riddle!"
I sacrifice all of my "pieces" and banish them from the game! With this, I summon my strongest servant!
Come out, the ultimate form of Shirakami Fubuki, ruler of time and space, Shadow Eye Blizzard Fox!
That isn't a monster... That's Fubuki!
I just have to defeat your Fubuki in order to win! Now, you would do well to bow before the most noble power in the entire Hololive Headquarters!
... I wouldn't be so sure about that.
Fubuki, you're still standing...? But how...?
Quick-Play Spell Activated! I fuse the furniture "Secret Magic Booster" with myself!
This effect can only be activated in another world! It nullifies one direct attack from the opponent, and reflects it back at them!
You're saying that it's an effect that's not written on the card, but... a hidden effect?!
Th-That... There's no way...! Gahh!
Did the enemy just faint from Kawakaze's silently striking her with the back of her sword?
The mysterious space has dissipated... W-We've won... right?
For some reason, I'm tired out... Let's hurry to the Hololive headquarters...

New Holo Island.say: Hmm, to think that even you would lose... It seems like there really is a limit to using "pieces."
*cough* *cough*... My sincerest apologies...
It doesn't matter. From the beginning, the only purpose you've all served was to buy more time for me while I increased my authorization over the Mirror Sea. In other words, "pieces."
Look around you. The Mirror Seas around us slowly bend to my will, and the pseudo-Singularity that shall serve as a "Gate" between worlds shall open soon!
With this power, repairing "pieces" is a simple task... So what say you? Do you wish to reward the Resistance with one final battle?
Thank you for your consideration... I see now... the authorization is almost complete... Everything has been going according to plan.
Sure. You've bought me the time I needed to clear the authorization, so... Go forth, quickly...
The sound of a surge of electricity was followed by wisps of smoke rising from Tester's body. The Siren collapsed as she lost consciousness.
Everything has been going according to plan... Now, it's time for me to prepare my next move.
Waters surrounding the Hololive HQ
Y'know, I've been through quite a lot, so I thought nothing could surprise me...
But this performance stage...
A performance stage, cobbled together with blocks of various colors, loomed before Zuikaku.
The words "HOLOLIVE" were assembled with large blocks towards the stage's rear.
Though the appearance was quite normal, there was something indescribably threatening about it.
Zed, I want to watch a concerton this stage.
I know nothing about that!
Eh? Do you girls also go to concerts?
W-well, not all of them, but some of them...
"Hololive Stage," huh... Is this where everyone gathers for performances in your world?
This is the new Holo Island Stage that Fubuki made! In any case, it might be a bit unfamiliar to you guys.
Awawawa! This was just... supposed to be a parody! *hides*
(I have a feeling she just barely stopped herself from saying something really controversial...)
Before I came here, I actually wanted to dance on stage with the others. This stage is so cute with all its different colors~
